description:
Fortnite is back! Be the last player standing in Battle Royale, Zero Build, Blitz and OG, carry your squad to victory in fast-paced Reload, build your own adventures in LEGO® Fortnite, or headline a concert in Fortnite Festival — it's all here.

Play thousands of free developer-made islands with your friends, including tycoons, deathruns, zombie survival, and more
name: Fortnite
editorsReview:
If you're searching for a top-tier action experience on your mobile device, look no further than Fortnite. Created by the talented team at Epic Games, Inc, this free-to-play game has quickly become a massively popular title with 13M+ downloads worldwide. With a solid rating of 3.9 stars, it delivers exactly what fans of the genre are looking for and then some.

What sets Fortnite apart from other action titles is its attention to moment-to-moment gameplay. Every encounter feels meaningful, and the controls are tight enough to make you feel in complete control. The game features an extensive arsenal of tools at your disposal, and discovering new combinations and strategies is part of what makes the experience so addictive.

From a technical standpoint, Fortnite impresses with its polished presentation. The game runs smoothly with minimal loading times, and the visual style is both attractive and functional. The UI design deserves special mention for being intuitive and uncluttered, allowing players to focus on what matters most: the gameplay itself.

Overall, Fortnite earns its solid reputation with flying colors. It's a polished, content-rich experience that respects your time while providing countless hours of entertainment. The fact that it's free-to-play makes it even more appealing, as the value proposition is excellent. If you haven't tried Fortnite yet, now is the perfect time to jump in and discover why 13M+ players already love it.
howToPlay:
Getting started with Fortnite is straightforward. Download the game from the Google Play Store, and once installed, open the app. You'll be greeted with a brief tutorial that walks you through the core mechanics. We recommend completing the full tutorial even if you're experienced with action games, as Fortnite has some unique features you won't want to miss.

The control scheme in Fortnite is intuitive yet deep. Movement is handled through the left virtual stick, while combat actions are mapped to the right side of the screen. Tap for quick attacks, hold for charged attacks, and swipe for special moves. As you unlock new abilities, additional buttons will appear, but the game does a good job of introducing them gradually so you're never overwhelmed.

Pro tips for Fortnite:

• Upgrade your main character's abilities first before spreading resources across multiple heroes.
• Learn enemy attack patterns — most bosses have a predictable cycle you can exploit.
• Save your ultimate ability for tough encounters rather than using it on regular enemies.
• Complete daily challenges for premium currency and rare upgrade materials.
• Join an active clan for access to exclusive events and cooperative battles.
• Keep your gear level matched to your character level for optimal performance.

description:
Play online or over local WiFi with 4-15 players as you attempt to prep your spaceship for departure, but beware as one will be an impostor bent on killing everyone!

Crewmates can win by completing all tasks or discovering and voting the impostor off the ship. 

The Impostor can use sabotage to cause chaos, making for easier kills and better alibis.

description:
Looking for a way to relax and unwind after a long day? Or maybe you’re just looking for a fun game to play when bored? Kick The Buddy is the perfect anti stress game for you! This cool game lets you take a break, have fun, and release some energy in a light-hearted way. Whether it’s kicking, punching, or tossing Buddy around, this is all about having fun without any real harm—after all, Buddy is just a ragdoll dummy!

Why you’ll love Kick The Buddy:

– Fun & Relaxing: Release stress with funny and simple gameplay. Punch, toss, or stretch Buddy in this anti-stress relaxing toy game.
– Awesome Weapons: From heavy guns to imaginative gadgets, choose from a huge range of items to create your own fun.
– Customize Buddy: Make your Buddy stand out! Add cool accessories and give him a whole new look.
– Offline Fun: Enjoy the game anywhere! It’s one of the best anti stress games offline, so no need for Wi-Fi.
– Non-stop Action: Whether you’re looking for a fun game or want to experiment with ragdoll game physics.
– Great for Everyone: Fans of boy games for free, ragdoll simulators, and stickman dismounting will love this game!

No need to worry about stress anymore—just kick, punch, and stretch Buddy in this funny game. Buddy never gets hurt—he’s just a test dummy ready for action! The gameplay is light-hearted, so it’s all about having fun without the stress of strategy or tough challenges. It’s not a killing game, Buddy is here to make you smile, not to be destroyed. You can experiment with toss the buddy, try some cool games weapons, or just have fun with dummy games.

This one of the best destress relaxing games is perfect for:

– People who want a fun game that’s easy to pick up and play.
– Those looking for stress relief games after a busy day.
– Players who enjoy fun no wifi games to pass the time.
– Anyone looking for fun games with no wifi for travel or just to chill

Whether you’re a fan of destruction games, weird games to play, or simply want to kick back and relax with really fun games, Kick The Buddy has got you covered. It’s one of the fun awesome games that’ll make you laugh and relax at the same time!

So, what are you waiting for? It’s time to beat the buddy and enjoy some stress relief in this humorous game. No pressure, no rush—just pure fun! Download now and see why it’s one of the funnest games out there.

description:
Launch, Upgrade, and Conquer the Skies with your plane!

Prepare for an exhilarating aerial adventure in Epic Plane Evolution, where your piloting skills and strategic upgrades determine how far your aircraft can soar. Launch your plane, navigate through diverse terrains, and evolve your aircraft to achieve maximum distance. Whether you're a casual gamer or a flight enthusiast, this game offers a captivating blend of action and strategy.

Epic Plane Evolution is a physics-based flight game that challenges players to launch their aircraft using a slingshot mechanism and guide it through various environments. As you progress, collect coins to upgrade your plane's components, enhancing its performance and unlocking new flight capabilities. Each level introduces unique challenges, requiring precise timing and strategic upgrades to succeed.

🎯 Slingshot Launch Mechanics
Initiate each flight by pulling back your plane on a slingshot, determining the initial speed and angle. Mastering this mechanic is crucial for achieving optimal flight paths and distances.

🚀 Aircraft Evolution and Upgrades
Accumulate coins during flights to invest in upgrades such as wings, engines, and fuselage enhancements. These improvements not only boost your plane's performance but also unlock new visual designs and capabilities.

🌍 Diverse Environments
Navigate through a variety of terrains, each presenting unique obstacles and weather conditions. Adapt your flight strategy to overcome challenges like wind currents, mountainous regions, and urban landscapes.

🧭 Strategic Flight Control
While airborne, adjust your plane's pitch and angle to maintain momentum and avoid obstacles. Strategic in-flight decisions can significantly impact your flight distance and coin collection.

💰 Rewarding Progression System
Earn coins based on the distance traveled and successful navigation through obstacles. Use these earnings to continuously upgrade your aircraft, pushing the boundaries of how far you can fly.

🎁 Daily Challenges and Rewards
Engage in daily missions that offer additional rewards, encouraging consistent play and providing opportunities to test new strategies and upgrades.

📲 Download and Take Flight!

description:
Grab your friends and play Stumble Guys, the fun free-to-play multiplayer party royale game!

Compete in fast-paced knockout games with up to 32 players and race through cool obstacle courses and chaotic elimination full of action. Play now and become the last player standing in Stumble Guys, the ultimate online multiplayer party game experience!

💥 JOIN THE 32-PLAYER ONLINE MULTIPLAYER MADNESS
Call your friends to battle and race in fun knockout games full of action! Dodge giant snowballs, jump over lasers, and make sure to dash through all games — but don’t fall or clash!

🌍 EXPLORE 60+ EPIC MAPS FOR ENDLESS FUN
Dash through obstacle courses, jump over crazy traps, and play against your friends and other players - every map brings a new set of thrilling action games and surprises!

🏁 PLAY TOURNAMENTS & CLIMB THE RANKED LEADERBOARD
Run, clash, kick, and fall to survive in competitive battle games, collect points to climb the Ranked leaderboard, and unlock cool rewards!

🎨 CUSTOMIZE YOUR STUMBLER
Unlock and collect thousands of skins, emotes, and more for free! Become a ninja, superhero, or even a chicken - you craft your very own look to win these cool multiplayer games in style!

🔥 LIMITED-TIME EVENTS & EPIC CROSSOVER COLLABS!
Jump into special events featuring the best game modes like Floor is Lava and Banana Bonanza, or expand your collection with legendary stumblers from SpongeBob, My Hero Academia, and more.

📱 CROSS-PLAY ON STEAM & MOBILE!
Play Stumble Guys with your friends on mobile and Steam for free! Join battles anytime, anywhere, in this fun, cross-platform online action multiplayer party game.

Ready to stumble and brawl with your friends? Download Stumble Guys now on mobile and play the fun multiplayer knockout game for free!

description:
Free Fire × Jujutsu Kaisen collaboration is here!
Experience a new kind of Jujutsu battle and a range of crossover content.

[Battle at FF-Style Jujutsu High]
Welcome to the FF-Style Jujutsu High! In Battle Royale, explore the campus, uncover hidden surprises, and meet other survivors dressed as Yuji Itadori, Megumi Fushiguro, Nobara Kugisaki, and Satoru Gojo!

[Jujutsu]
Wield Kugisaki’s hammer, master your Cursed Energy, and unleash iconic Jujutsu like Divergent Fist, Malevolent Shrine, Hollow Purple, and Unlimited Void. Classic Cursed Tools and Jujutsu arrive in both BR and CS. Fight like a true Jujutsu Sorcerer!

[More Cursed Energy Gameplay]
Discover new features like jujutsu-enhanced weapons and Revival Points. Use your power wisely, Sorcerer!


Free Fire is a world-famous survival shooter game available on mobile. Each 10-minute game places you on a remote island where you are pit against 49 other players, all seeking survival. Players freely choose their starting point with their parachute, and aim to stay in the safe zone for as long as possible. Drive vehicles to explore the vast map, hide in the wild, or become invisible by proning under grass or rifts. Ambush, snipe, survive, there is only one goal: to survive and answer the call of duty.
Free Fire, Battle In Style!

[Survival shooter in its original form]
Search for weapons, stay in the play zone, loot your enemies and become the last man standing. Along the way, go for legendary airdrops while avoiding airstrikes to gain that little edge against other players.

[10 minutes, 50 players, epic survival goodness awaits]
Fast and Lite gameplay - Within 10 minutes, a new survivor will emerge. Will you go beyond the call of duty and be the one under the shining lite?

[4-man squad, with in-game voice chat]
Create squads of up to 4 players and establish communication with your squad at the very first moment. Answer the call of duty and lead your friends to victory and be the last team standing at the apex.

[Clash Squad]
A fast paced 4v4 game mode! Manage your economy, purchase weapons, and defeat the enemy squad!

[Realistic and smooth graphics]
Easy to use controls and smooth graphics promises the optimum survival experience you will find on mobile to help you immortalize your name among the legends.


[Contact us]
Customer Service: https://ffsupport.garena.com/hc/en-us

description:
War Drone: AC-130 Gunship Military Game

Engage in Realistic Aerial Combat Warfare
• Command advanced military drones and the legendary AC-130 Gunship in this modern shooter experience.
• Take part in explosive firefights from the skies, defending allied forces and executing real-time airstrikes.
• Use strategic flight paths, locking systems, and weapon calibration to simulate real-life drone control.
• Navigate immersive 3D battlefields with accurate targeting systems and realistic drone physics.

Tactical Shooter Gameplay
• Enter the battlefield as a high-tech air force marksman with access to lethal weapon systems.
• Shoot down waves of hostiles in fast-paced combat encounters with precision and skill.
• Fire 25mm Gatling guns, launch Hydra 70 rockets, and deploy Hellfire missiles to wipe out enemy squads.

Simulate True Drone Warfare
• Experience realistic mission objectives based on military drone operations.
• Plan your attacks using satellite recon, engage in close air support, and simulate UAV command roles.
• Control weapon heat, ammo supply, and targeting drift like a real drone operator.
• Every mission requires tactical awareness, flight control, and calculated decision-making.

Upgrade & Customize Your Arsenal
• Equip your drone with customizable loadouts: guns, rockets, missiles, and countermeasures.
• Unlock advanced gear like signal jammers, auto-tracking turrets, and enhanced flight controls.
• Build the ultimate combat drone through realistic progression systems and gear trees.

Call in AI-Controlled Support Units
• Use reinforcement mechanics to deploy tanks, soldiers, and airstrikes.
• Coordinate air-to-ground tactics and suppress enemy forces from multiple fronts.
• SuperWeapons include EMP drones, cluster missile barrages, and drone swarms.

Varied Enemy Types for Shooter Fans
• Engage against:
        •        Infantry, rocket teams, and machine gun nests
        •        Armored vehicles and moving convoys
        •        Attack helicopters, jets, and drones
        •        Strategic structures and mobile bases
• Enemy AI adapts, forcing players to use diverse shooter tactics.

Complete Missions, Unlock Rewards
• Earn gold, cash, and rare upgrades by completing high-risk combat simulations.
• Conquer wave-based shooter scenarios, time-sensitive bombings, and escort operations.

The Ultimate Shooter-Simulation Hybrid
• Combines realistic drone simulation with action-packed shooter gameplay.
• For fans of military simulators, tactical combat, and immersive first-person warfare.
• Download now and command the future of aerial warfare.

This game includes optional in-game purchases (includes random items).
Note: Internet connection required to play.

description:
Wanna go for a drive and enjoy a traffic game? Navigate your vehicle on the road to avoid traffic without crashing any cars and reach the goal. There is traffic in front of you, but you must run and drive through the traffic. If you drive carefully, you will level up easily. This game is 3D graphic so you feel like you are driving for real.

Drive all kinds of vehicles with your skill: trucks, station wagons, vans, jeeps, limousines, sports cars, and more by earning coins and level up! You can also change the car’s color to your favorite one! Vehicles cross the street at fast and furious speeds and race down asphalt roads, highways, railroad crossings and roundabouts. The object of this game is to cross the street without crashing into other cars. Drive on the asphalt carefully, but don’t be too cautious! You won’t be able to reach the goal if you hesitate. But beware of traffic lights, roundabouts and railroad crossings... And, of course, the police!

Cops and police are everywhere, especially during rush hour. You may be pulled over by the cops or police, but don’t worry! Keep driving and drifting! This is an ultimate hyper-action casual game, created by a Japanese hypercasual studio, Geisha Tokyo.
Pick me up, or I can pick you up for a drive!

Please share on your social media, such as Instagram, Snapchat or TikTok and let us know of your progress! Take screenshots and share with your friends. Enjoy the ride and compete with your friends! If you enjoy playing games such as level up, police or cop, drift, or car parking games then you will love and enjoy Traffic Run!

How to Play:
Traffic Run! is super easy to control and navigate! Use your instinct! Tap and hold to drive forward. Simply let go to make your vehicle stop. Earn coins placed on the road. No need to manually turn on curves. Super simple and intuitive controlling system available for all types of devices!

You can even feed your food to other foods! Yum!

HIGHLIGHTS
◉ Tons of cute and kawaii foods to discover
◉ Control a huge crowd of foods - so many that you'll lose count!
◉ Lots of hats to decorate your foods with
◉ Simple and addictive gameplay!
◉ Collect coins and become rich!

THE STORY
It's a crazy world, there's food running around everywhere! Help guide the cute foods through the level as they race towards the end. Feed the foods to other foods at the end of the level to unlock even more foods! Keep playing to discover more foods and surprises!

Easy to play, hard to master!

PLAY OFFLINE
Internet is not required to play this game! Enjoy!

description:
Fast-paced 3v3 & 5v5 MOBA and battle royale made for mobile! Play a variety of online PvP arena multiplayer shooting & melee game modes in under three minutes – with friends or solo.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful super abilities, star powers and gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. 

Battle in multiple game modes


Gem Grab (3v3,5v5): Team up for realtime 3v3 and 5v5 MOBA arena PvP battle royales against online players from across the world. Team up to battle and out strategize against the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.


Showdown: A MOBA battle royale-style fight for survival. Collect powerups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo, be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest MOBA PvP battle royale yet. Winner takes all! 


Brawl Ball (3v3,5v5): It's a whole new brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score before the other team. Maybe it’s not the kind of “shooting” you meant when you were looking for a multiplayer shooting game... but there are no red cards here – just PvP team fun.


Bounty (3v3,5v5): Battle royale bounty-hunting! Take out opponents and earn stars, but don’t let them pick you off first. The squad with the most stars wins!


Heist (3v3,5v5): Protect your team’s safe, and try to crack open your opponents’. Sneak, blast, battle and blow your way clear to enemy treasure in this PvP multiplayer shooting game.


Special Events: Limited-time PvE and PvP multiplayer shooting games, 3v3/5v5 matches and battle royale events.


Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers.

Unlock and upgrade Brawlers
Collect and upgrade Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, star powers and gadgets! Level up and collect unique skins. Send them into PvP & battle royale games to collect trophies!

Brawl pass
Win 3v3 and 5v5 PvP matches and battle royale games to earn trophies. Get Gems, Power Points, Pins, and Starr Drops! Fresh content every season.

Become a star player
Battle in 3v3 & 5v5 PvP matches and battle royale-style games to climb the PvP leaderboards & prove you’re the greatest MOBA Brawler of them all! Join or start your own MOBA club with fellow players online to share tips and battle together. Climb to the top of the PvP leaderboards in global and local multiplayer shooting game rankings.


Constantly evolving MOBS
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and game modes in the future. Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins. Enjoy 3v3 and 5v5 PvP battles solo or with friends online.
New PvP events and multiplayer shooting games daily. Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master.

Please note! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Game also includes random rewards

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale, and Boom Beach!

The IGRS Rating for this game is 15+

Notice of Access Permission:
[Optional permission]
Brawl Stars may request permission via in game pop ups to access your camera and send you notifications.
Camera: For in game scanning of QR codes
Notifications: For sending notifications related to the game
Consent is optional and you can use the app and play the game regardless of whether or not you consent. You may refuse to give consent within the game. However, certain app features may not work properly if you refuse optional access permissions.

Support:
Contact in game via Settings > Help and Support, or visit http://help.supercellsupport.com/brawlstars/en/index.html

Privacy Policy: 
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent’s Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/

Are you ready to become the ultimate spider hero and take on the fight for justice in the game of the highly anticipated movie? You'll step into the shoes of the iconic spider hero and battle against notorious city gangs and nefarious villains to save the city from destruction.

With this game, you'll experience the rush of hero action as you use your spider abilities to swing through the streets, dodge obstacles, and defeat enemies in epic battles. Explore iconic locations from the movie and comics, such as Times Square, and come face-to-face with various villains.

From the classic suit to the advanced iron suit, you'll have the power to take on any challenge the city gangs throws at you. The game also features an open-world sandbox mode, where you can swing around the city, complete side missions, and challenge yourself with different challenges, all while discovering hidden secrets and collectibles. It's a perfect way to explore the city and take a break from the main storyline.

This is more than just a game, it's an epic spider hero experience. It's the perfect opportunity for fans of the comics, movies, and action-packed games to immerse themselves in the world of the spider hero, become a part of the legend and fight like a true superhero. With its engaging gameplay, stunning graphics, and an epic storyline, it's the ultimate spider hero experience. Download now and join the fight to save the city as the ultimate spider hero!

description:
👑KING OF THE CASTLE 

Well technically it’s a tower, but still. It’s yours, as long as you can keep the zombies away from it in this tower defense strategy game. It appears the zombie apocalypse is upon us based on how many of them are roaming the streets, so keep your gun nearby as you work to build your tower and keep it moving despite the waves of zombies.

🏗️CONSTRUCT AND DEFEND 

To build your tower, you’ll need to collect different blocks as you travel, which you can then assemble to form your fortress. Within each of the levels you can add different weapons that will help keep you safe and on the go despite the masses of zombies that are trying to get in to eat your brains. Be careful, once your defenses are breached, you’re as good as dead so keep building and moving!

🧟‍♂️Ready, aim, fire – It’s a zombie tsunami! This RPG shooter will keep you busy blasting zombies as you work to build and protect your mobile castle. Wage war on the undead to avoid becoming one with them. Collect new and exciting weapons along the way, and make sure you upgrade them so that your shooter skills remain top notch.

🧠Strategize – Use strategy to plow through your enemies as you roam in search of blocks to add to your tower. While there may be a lot of idle game play and zombie shooting, you will need to plan ahead and think about how and where you want to add weapons and more to your fortress. You’ll need all the guns and protection you can find as you advance through the levels and encounter more and more enemies!

💪 Level up – Progress through levels in this tower defense RPG, and gain access to more exciting upgrades, weapons, tower parts, and more! The Earth is your oyster if you can remain a survivor and avoid becoming zombified, so fight for your life and keep exploring.

🖌️So lively – The graphics, not the zombies. Dive into this world of vibrant and cute characters and delightful animations that really bring everything to life. Who knew fighting off zombie waves could be so adorable? Even as you work to come up with the winning strategy you’ll be able to relax and have some fun thanks to the chill vibes.

LAND OF THE LIVING DEAD ☢️

So come on then, survivor, build your tower and wage war on the zombies in this fun and engaging strategy shooter game! Use your tower to travel across the lands as you explore and take out enemies, and have fun customizing all the different levels with neat guns and other weapons that will help you in your fight against the undead. 

Download Tower Destiny Survive today to test your survival skills now!

description:
Make big numbers to reach the goal!

You can move your numbers by swiping.
You can absorb numbers on the stage that are smaller than yours when you hit them.
But if you bump into a number larger than you, you lose the number and have to start over.

Avoid electric saws, cross bridges, and jump ditches to reach the goal.

At the goal, many walls are waiting for you.
Break the walls one by one with big numbers and see the world beyond the goal!

description:
Tomb of the Mask is a fun game where you need to go through exciting mazes, successfully bypassing all the traps and escaping from the advancing lava! This game will appeal to everyone who likes old games, retro games and pixel games, as well as those who want to test their reflexes! Tomb of the Mask is an arcade game with vertical mazes and a variety of enemies and power-ups. At the beginning of the game, find a strange mask that will allow you to easily and quickly climb the walls, and go on a dynamic pixel adventure!

WHY YOU WILL ENJOY PLAYING THIS GAME: 

Old games style
This game perfectly captures the spirit of retro games with its pixel art and classic 8 bit mazes! There is also a lot of harmonious geometry and verticality, which is typical of games of the past on slot machines.

Checking the reaction
This game will test your reflexes countless times. The endless maze, as befits maze games, is stuffed with all sorts of traps. In addition, enemies will be waiting for you, for example snakes, from which you need to have time to escape! And that's not all: all this time the lava will constantly rise, so you need to think and move quickly.

Useful power-ups
To successfully pass any trap in the maze, use power-ups! Shields protect against collisions, a magnet attracts all coins and dots, and freezing immobilizes enemies!

Lots of powerful masks
Discover unique masks with special abilities! Put on your favorite powerful mask and use its characteristics, for example, get more coins or power-ups.

ALSO: 

Finally, these are very fun games! Fast, intense arcade gameplay, like the old games "Snake" and "Pac Man" (Pacman), will bring a lot of positive emotions! And you will definitely like the feeling that you were able to escape from the maze, try it yourself! But enough words, check out the famous game yourself and dive into a pixel retro adventure with The Mask! Hurry up and join us!

description:
Are you a fan of games that involve a ball? Then you'll love Rollance, the beautiful rolling ball game that's sure to keep you entertained for hours! Navigate your way through challenging obstacles and use your skills to roll the ball to the finish line. With realistic physics and a variety of levels to conquer, this game is perfect for anyone who loves a good challenge. Get ready to roll the ball and become a master of this addictive game!

CONTROL A BALL

Tap on the screen to roll the ball quickly or balance it carefully traveling through a level. Improve your attention & reaction to finish all the challenging levels on the first try.

OVERCOME OBSTACLES

The more levels you complete, the harder roads you should travel. Ramps, pendulums,  trampolines, hammers, and tons of other barriers you should overcome on your way to finish. Don’t let anything knock your rolling ball out of the road!

DON’T WASTE YOUR LIVES

Remember, the ball game doesn't save your progress on the level automatically unless you have spare lives. Play carefully, or you’ll start a level again.

USE BALL BOOSTERS

Want to finish the ball race faster? Collect different bonuses along the road to become bigger & stronger! Take every advantage from the boosters to finish all the ball game levels!

Why you’ll love this ball game:

- Realistic physics
- Beautiful 3D graphics
- ASMR game experience
- Rolling ball adventure
- Dozens of cool ball skins
- Simple controls

Are you ready for the challenging ball race? Prove your skills and make your ball roll through all the obstacles safe and sound! 
With realistic physics and an array of levels to conquer, Rollance is the exciting ball game for anyone who loves a good challenge. Whether you're a beginner or an expert, this game will keep you entertained for hours on end. Roll the ball and show off your skills in this thrilling rolling ball game!

description:
ROBLOX – PLAY, CREATE, AND EXPLORE MILLIONS OF EXPERIENCES

There’s something for everyone on Roblox. Whether you’re looking to explore, create, roleplay, compete, or hang out with friends, there's an endless amount of immersive experiences for you to discover. And even more are being made every day, all from a growing community of creators around the world.

Already have a Roblox account? Log in with your existing account and start exploring some of the most popular experiences from the Roblox community today, including Grow a Garden, Adopt Me!, Dress to Impress, SpongeBob Tower Defense, Brookhaven RP, How to Train Your Dragon, and more.

WHAT YOU CAN DO ON ROBLOX

DISCOVER ENDLESS EXPERIENCES
- Dive into adventures, role-playing games, simulators, obstacle courses, and more
- Explore trending experiences and fun, new games daily
- Compete in multiplayer battles, run your own business, or embark on epic quests  

CREATE YOUR OWN AVATAR
- Customize your avatar with your favorite clothing, accessories, and hairstyles
- Discover thousands of user-created avatar items in the Marketplace
- Express yourself with unique animations and emotes

EXPLORE TOGETHER—ANYTIME, ANYWHERE
- Play on mobile, tablet, PC, console, and VR headsets  
- Hang out and play with friends in multiplayer games across any device  

CHAT AND PLAY WITH PEOPLE YOU KNOW
- Join a Party and jump into experiences together  
- 13+ users can also chat via voice or text  

CREATE, BUILD, AND SHARE
- Design games and virtual spaces using Roblox Studio on Windows or Mac  
- Publish and share your experiences with millions of players  

INDUSTRY-LEADING SAFETY AND CIVILITY  
- Advanced content filtering and moderation  
- Parental controls and account restrictions for younger players  
- Clear community guidelines promoting respectful interactions  
- Dedicated trust & safety teams working around the clock 

WHY MILLIONS PLAY AND CREATE ON ROBLOX
- Immersive 3D multiplayer games and experiences  
- Safe, inclusive environments for everyone 
- A platform empowering anyone to become a creator  
- New content added daily by a global community

CREATE YOUR OWN EXPERIENCES: https://www.roblox.com/develop  
SUPPORT: https://en.help.roblox.com/hc/en-us  
CONTACT: https://corp.roblox.com/contact/  
PRIVACY POLICY: https://www.roblox.com/info/privacy  
PARENT’S GUIDE: https://corp.roblox.com/parents/  
TERMS OF USE: https://en.help.roblox.com/hc/en-us/articles/115004647846  

PLEASE NOTE: A network connection is required. Roblox works best over Wi-Fi.
name: Roblox
editorsReview:
Roblox by Roblox Corporation is a standout entry in the adventure genre that has captivated millions of mobile gamers. Available on Android, this free-to-play title boasts a impressive 4.3-star rating and continues to grow its dedicated player base. It's the kind of game that hooks you in the first session and keeps you coming back for more.

The world of Roblox is vast and filled with secrets waiting to be uncovered. Exploration is at the heart of the experience, with beautifully crafted environments that tell stories through environmental design. Puzzles are cleverly integrated into the adventure, providing satisfying "aha" moments that break up the exploration in meaningful ways.

The production values in Roblox are evident from the very first screen. Graphics are crisp and detailed, running smoothly even on older devices. The soundtrack is memorable and well-suited to the gameplay, while sound effects provide satisfying feedback for every action. It's clear that Roblox Corporation invested significant effort into making every aspect of the presentation shine.

In conclusion, Roblox is a must-download for fans of adventure games. With its impressive 4.3-star rating and 1.5B+ downloads, it has already proven itself as one of the top titles in its category. Whether you're a longtime fan of the genre or looking to try something new, Roblox delivers an experience that's well worth your time. Roblox Corporation has created something truly special here, and we highly recommend giving it a try.
howToPlay:
To begin playing Roblox, first download and install it from your device's app store. The game is available on Android. When you first launch the app, you'll be guided through an introductory sequence that teaches you the fundamentals. Pay close attention to these early instructions, as they lay the foundation for more advanced strategies you'll use later in the game.

Navigate through the world of Roblox by tapping or swiping on the screen to move your character. Interact with objects and NPCs by tapping on them when you're nearby. The map feature (accessible from the top menu) is your best friend — use it to find quest objectives, discover new areas, and track collectibles. Don't be afraid to explore off the beaten path, as many of the game's best rewards are hidden in unexpected places.

Tips for getting the most out of Roblox:

• Explore every area thoroughly before moving to the next — hidden items are common.
• Talk to all NPCs, as side quests often yield the best rewards.
• Keep a variety of items in your inventory for puzzle-solving flexibility.
• Use the map markers to track interesting locations you want to revisit later.
• Save frequently, especially before entering new areas or starting boss fights.
• Collect all the lore entries for a deeper understanding of the game's story.

description:
Dear players, our game is under active development! We ask you to write your wishes and suggestions, what you would like to see in the next update.

School Party is a cubic style life simulator for schoolchildren and teenagers.
You have a big city at your disposal, in which there are many cute girls and nice boys.
You not only have to hang out and do shopping, but also buy mansions, meet cool characters and even ride the coolest cars!
In this city, your possibilities know no boundaries: building houses, buying blocks, furniture and doors is just the beginning of a big adventure.
Be trendy and stylish - dress up, walk around town, swim in the pool, go to the movies and dance in the crazy disco!

Crafting and building:
Many beautiful mansions with large plots where you can demolish the purchased house and build the cottage of your dreams.
A large collection of various blocks for construction and decoration.
Hundreds of types of furniture for every taste: chairs, tables, sofas and beds, wardrobes and more.
Doors, houseplants and chandeliers will complete the design of your home.

Relationship between players:
Don't worry, you are not alone in the city.
There are thousands of people in the city with whom you can communicate, be friends, walk together, visit a restaurant and a park, ride supercars together and hang out in a nightclub.
If you like the character, add him to the phone book and communicate with him via SMS at any time.

Paintball:
Large selection of paintball weapons:
Miniguns, Pistols, Assault Rifles and exclusive Dinogun, Bazooka-Shark and more.
All this shoots colored bullets with paints.
Shoot the hooligans who took your coins and they will return them to you.

Interesting places:
- Market (furniture, blocks, doors, skins and paintball guns)
- Disco (order music from DJs and dance with your friends)
- Large park
- Beach and sea with sun loungers
- Restaurant and cinema
- School and bank
- Car dealership and gas station
- City pool

Features of the game:
- Driving cars and tuning
- Sport: motorcycles, bicycles, scooters and skateboards
- Mini-games (barman in the disco (2nd floor), barman in the restaurant (1st floor), game of smiles)
- Chests with coins and many bonuses
- Ship cruise and airplane flight
- Swimming (on the beach and in the pools)
- Beautiful character animation
- First and Third person camera
- Interactive with furniture (sit, sleep etc)
- Change of weather and time of day
- Convenient and intuitive controls
- Optimization for weak devices (from 1 GB of RAM)
- Customization of gameplay and buttons to your liking

Create your pixel interior in the world of fairy tales and fantasy.
Enjoy your game.

_______________

Notes: 
- This app is free-to-play and offers in-game purchases. It is optimized for smartphones, not tablets.

- Application may not run on certain devices even if they have compatible OS versions installed.
- It is recommended to play while connected to a network in order to obtain accurate location information.
- Compatibility information may be changed at any time.
- Please visit PokemonGO.com for additional compatibility information. 
- Information current as of October 20, 2020.
name: Pokémon GO
editorsReview:
If you're searching for a top-tier adventure experience on your mobile device, look no further than Pokémon GO. Created by the talented team at Niantic, Inc., this free-to-play game has quickly become a massively popular title with 531M+ downloads worldwide. With a solid rating of 3.9 stars, it delivers exactly what fans of the genre are looking for and then some.

The soundtrack is memorable and well-suited to the gameplay, while sound effects provide satisfying feedback for every action. It's clear that Niantic, Inc. invested significant effort into making every aspect of the presentation shine.

Overall, Pokémon GO earns its solid reputation with flying colors. It's a polished, content-rich experience that respects your time while providing countless hours of entertainment. If you haven't tried Pokémon GO yet, now is the perfect time to jump in and discover why 531M+ players already love it.
howToPlay:
To begin playing Pokémon GO, first download and install it from your device's app store. The game is available on Android and iOS. When you first launch the app, you'll be guided through an introductory sequence that teaches you the fundamentals. Pay close attention to these early instructions, as they lay the foundation for more advanced strategies you'll use later in the game.

Exploring in Pokémon GO is simple and intuitive. Tap anywhere on the screen to move to that location, or use the virtual joystick for more precise control. When you approach interactive objects, a prompt will appear — tap it to investigate, collect items, or trigger events. Keep an eye on your inventory, as you'll often need specific items to solve puzzles or progress past certain obstacles.

Tips for getting the most out of Pokémon GO:

• Explore every area thoroughly before moving to the next — hidden items are common.

• Use the map markers to track interesting locations you want to revisit later.

description:
Join players around the globe in this animal adventure game. Build treasure islands and bridges, raid your friends’ bases, collect coins, unlock new pet characters, and go on a journey to explore the legendary animal kingdom!

Build animal treasure islands 🏝️
Conquer different islands, steal coins from other players, including your friends, win mini-games to find loot, and become the true ruler of the animal kingdom!

Even better, you can unlock more pet characters, from the bear and the pig to the rabbit and the deer. All are so cute, but how many can you unlock?

🗺️ REVEAL DIFFERENT KINGDOM ISLANDS
Build bridges, solve mini puzzles, loot coins and treasures from others, build your dream island, unlock more adventures, and explore the animal kingdom.

💣 STEAL COINS & RAID LANDS
You can win coins and treasures, cash, or gems by raiding other players’ animal islands. 

🕹️ PLAY AGAINST YOUR FACEBOOK FRIENDS
Attack your friends and other players, raid lands, steal coins and treasures, and defend your island from ongoing attacks. Looking for revenge? You can raid other players and steal their gold coins and treasures! 

🐿️ COLLECT ANIMAL CHARACTER CARDS
Explore islands and kingdoms and find unique animal cards. Once you finish the collection, you’ll win prizes including island coins and exclusive power-ups - plus the cute pets!

Like to play multiplayer raid games? In this exciting social coin game where you can raid lands and other animal islands to find millions of coins and loot or treasure chests.

HOW TO PLAY ANIMALS & COINS TO BECOME THE KING OF COINS
* Tap and hold to build a bridge
* Release to drop the bridge onto the adjacent platform. Hold for the perfect duration to earn extra cool rewards, island coins, gems, and more! Your running animal will show you the way with every bridge you build.
* Earn and collect coins from each successful bridge to spend on gear for your island. 
* Collect all animal cards to win exclusive prizes!

Join millions of players worldwide and become the next master of coins!

Animals & Coins is intended for those 18 and older. Animals & Coins may also contain advertising. You may require an internet connection to play Animals & Coins and access its social features. You can also find more information about the functionality, compatibility, and interoperability of Animals & Coins in the above description and additional app store information. By downloading this game, you agree to future game updates as released on your app store or social network. You may choose to update this game, but if you do not update, your game experience and functionalities may be reduced.

Animals & Coins does not require payment to download and play, but it also allows you to purchase virtual items with real money inside the game, including random items.

description:
Travel through the kingdom and its different regions in this 3D adventure inspired by late 90s games. Explore each region freely, uncover their secrets, and save your bear friends! This realm was once a peaceful place, until the bees started producing purple honey, a strange substance that turns anyone who eats it into a mindless foe. You will play as Baaren, a courageous bear set on a quest to free the kingdom from this menace of unknown origin.

Along the way, you will find loads of collectibles, items to customize your character, exciting places to explore, speedy vehicles to drive, daily challenges to test your skills, and fun mini-games to play. Using Baaren’s straightforward yet complete set of moves, you will be able to climb steep mountains, fight dangerous enemies, and explore this world packed with surprises.

description:
PK XD is a creative kids game set in a colorful virtual world where imagination, role play, and fun come together.

Designed as a safe and family-friendly game, PK XD allows kids to explore an open world, create their own avatar, and enjoy creative adventures through play, storytelling, and social interaction.

In this open world kids game, children can design characters, build spaces, play mini games, and roleplay different activities in a safe environment.

PK XD is a virtual world where creativity leads the experience, encouraging kids to express themselves while playing freely with friends and family.

CREATE YOUR AVATAR AND EXPRESS YOUR CREATIVITY! Within the game, you will have the opportunity to create your own avatar and express your personality in a unique way! Do you want to be a human avatar, a zombie avatar, or even a unicorn avatar? Let your imagination flow and mix and match fun clothes and accessories. Use colorful hair, fantastic wings, armor, swords, and explore the PK XD World. Be whoever you want to be and experience various professions such as an influencer avatar, astronaut avatar, scientist avatar, chef avatar, and much more. Hit play and let the fun begin!

CREATE AND EXPLORE AMAZING GAMES Have fun with your friends in exciting challenges like crazy races and pizza deliveries, among others! In PK XD, there are always new games for you to enjoy! And if you thought of something that doesn't exist in our PK XD World yet, don't worry, you can create your own experience in PK XD Builder! Create mini-games, amusement parks, soccer fields, or even a shopping mall. Here, there are no limits to your creativity. With so many games to explore, the fun is guaranteed!

CREATE AND BUILD THE PERFECT HOUSE AND HAVE YOUR FAVORITE VEHICLE IN THE GAME How about building your dream house within the game? In PK XD, your avatar can have a pool, a game room, a playground, and many other incredible details like wallpapers, fantastic sofas and bean bags, fun paintings, and much more. Besides that, you can also have amazing vehicles like skateboards, scooters, cars, rollerblades, or motorcycles to keep in your garage. Explore and live this unique experience. The fun is guaranteed!

HAVE YOUR OWN VIRTUAL PET IN THE GAME Ever imagined combining two pets and creating a unique virtual creature? In the PK XD World, you can have a lot of fun with your pet! The more you take care of your pet, the more it can evolve and transform into a fantastic animal! In the PK XD game, you can play with your family and also have a virtual pet to take care of. Hit play in the game and let the fun begin!

SPECIAL EVENTS AND UPDATES Special dates become even more amazing in the PK XD World! Make sure your avatar and your family celebrate Halloween, Christmas, Easter, our anniversary, and many other exclusive events with themed items within the game! Stay tuned for all the news!

JOIN THE COOLEST GAMER COMMUNITY Build the game with us! We want to hear all your suggestions to offer the best possible experience for you and your family!

In PK XD, children's safety is our priority. We comply with data protection laws and ensure a safe environment for players to enjoy their virtual adventures. We maintain the privacy and protection of our players' personal data. For more information about our policies, please visit: 
https://policies.playpkxd.com/en/privacy/3.0. For our terms of service, please visit: https://policies.playpkxd.com/en/terms/2.0. Have fun with peace of mind and confidence, as we are committed to providing a safe environment for all our players!

Follow us to stay updated on all the news: @pkxd.universe

Epic Stickman: Idle RPG War is a thrilling idle RPG adventure where darkness reigns and your stickman hero fights even while you’re offline. In this AFK auto-battle game, your legend never sleeps — only grows stronger. The realm of shadows is calling. Are you ready to answer?

⚔️ Idle RPG Action That Never Stops
Battle through hordes of monsters and earn epic rewards — even when you're away. Enjoy seamless auto-battle mechanics that let your Stickman progress on his own.

🕶️ Explore the Shadow Realm
Dive into a dark fantasy world filled with secrets, bosses, and treasures. Survive wave after wave of enemies in this action-packed roleplaying adventure.

💥 Customize and Evolve
Personalize your hero’s look, fighting style, and gear. Build your dream stickman champion and take down every foe in your way. Whether you're into idle RPGs, AFK clickers, stickman games, or auto-fight adventures, this game delivers it all. It’s time to claim your place among the legends.

description:
It’s showtime! Grab some popcorn & experience an exciting special Sonic The Hedgehog Movie 3 update with new characters, zones, combos, rewards, and events in this epic endless runner adventure! Collect movie themed items on the track to unlock great prizes each day!

Sonic the Hedgehog is back! Play online and run fast in this cool take on casual multiplayer battle & racing games from SEGA!

Sonic Forces stands out among running games, offering the perfect fusion of endless runner and racing multiplayer games . Select your iconic racer from the Sonic universe to run, race, and compete in multiplayer running games and play together with real players from around the world for lightning fast competitive race games! Sonic Forces is the ultimate PvP multiplayer racer for fans of running games.

The ultimate multiplayer running game is here! Play online, race, and battle with your favorite characters in Sonic Forces Take control of Sonic the Hedgehog, Knuckles, Shadow, and other iconic characters as you compete in fast-paced versus race games and epic battles through exciting Sonic worlds.

Play online multiplayer running games to take on other players from around the world in 4 player versus racing games, dodging obstacles, using power-ups, and become the first racer to cross the finish line! Play together with friends or challenge new foes for a chance to run and race up classic loop de loops in Green Hill Zone or subway tunnels and streets in Golden Bay Zone. Use speed and strategy to win racing multiplayer games! 

This PvP running game lets you play online and become the ultimate speed racer, running and racing through stunning landscapes while engaging in epic battles. This isn't just a run-of-the-mill running game; every match is a fun race with an immersive PvP multiplayer experience that seamlessly blends the elements of versus racing games and battle games.

SONIC FORCES
RUN, RACE, AND WIN MULTIPLAYER GAMES!
- Play online in PvP multiplayer race games to win trophies to unlock more content
- A fun race to the top of the PvP multiplayer racing leaderboards
- Play together with friends or race past the competition in fun run games
- Spin, jump and slide your way to multiplayer games victory with Sonic!

PLAY RACING & RUNNING GAMES WITH SONIC & FRIENDS
- Join epic running and racing multiplayer games with Sonic and his friends, dash to victory!
- Race as Sonic, Amy, Tails, Knuckles, Shadow, and more awesome Sonic heroes
- Use powerful racer specific power ups to finish first
- Level up and improve your favorite runner’s racing skills

CHALLENGING MULTIPLAYER FUN RACE TRACKS
- Play online and race against 4 players within the iconic Sonic Universe
- Run, battle, jump, and race through Green Hill, Golden Bay, and more unique zones
- Experience racing games the Sonic racer way in this spectacular 3D runner game

Dive into the world of endless runner games and play together with Sonic Forces' versus multiplayer, creating a unique and thrilling experience that combines strategy and speed. Immerse yourself in the world of endless runner race games, where each race is a new adventure and a chance to become the ultimate endless runner champion.

description:
OneState – Live Free, Play Real

Discover OneState – mobile city life simulator that changes the meaning of role-playing. Freedom and self-expression define who you become here – this is your world, your story. We welcome you to a living city filled with real people, an online rp experience where every action, choice, and alliance shapes your future.

Live Your Role
Create your own story in a living city, explore our highly detailed pocket-sized copy of LA! Be whoever you want to be in that rp life simulator – gangster, police officer, serviceman, medic, CEO of your own business empire. Build your life from the ground up and make your mark in a massive role play open world that never sleeps.

Hustle - Trade - Profit
Start small, dream big. Work your job, flip deals, build your business, and invest in real estate. Rise from the streets to the skyline. In OneState ambition pays off – your hustle defines you. Wanna’ matter? Make a move! Live it all in roleplay online multiplayer, where every step counts.

Uphold the Law or Break It
Enforce the law as a police officer, dominate the urban battlefield as a soldier, or save lives as a medic. Not your role play style? Then live the thug life, join the gang game, conquer territories, and build your street empire. Every path matters. This is true city life role-play!

Drive Hard – Drive Custom
Own the streets with fully-tunable rides. Collect, upgrade, and design cars that scream personality. There’s no proper city roleplay without a proper car park, right? Cruise, drift, or escape high-speed police pursuits – every car race, every new tune-up adds to your fame. Your garage in OneState not just stores your cars, it also contains part of your online rp identity.

Create Your Image
Life roleplay is about being authentic and unique. Customize your look, and style. From your outfit and accessories to your attitude – everything tells your story. Develop your reputation, climb ranks, and live it your way in the ultimate RP mobile simulator.

Join a Living City
Seasonal events and fresh drops keep OneState a constantly evolving online roleplay world. Interact with real people in a massive RP community on mobile.

Create your story and live it out in OneState – the life simulator where freedom is real!

description:
Search for hidden objects, find clues and unlock rewards in this glamorous murder mystery adventure - June’s Journey!

June’s Journey is the ultimate adventure for fans of mystery games. Set in the glamorous 1920s, this thrilling detective mystery lets you search for hidden clues, uncover secrets, and explore stunning scenes full of suspense. Join June Parker on a captivating adventure through family scandals, clever puzzle games, and unforgettable twists. Whether you're solving crimes or enjoying the thrill of the search, this is one of the most captivating hidden object games you’ll ever play.

🔎Search & Find Hidden Objects
Sharpen your skills with hundreds of illustrated hidden object puzzles, where each location offers a new mystery to search through. From lavish mansions to exotic destinations, uncover missing objects, vital clues, and hidden secrets. Fans of finding hidden objects, seek and find, murder mysteries, and classic search puzzles will love this mystery adventure game!

🧩Solve Puzzles, Master Mysteries
Get swept into a dramatic adventure full of intrigue, deception, and murder mystery. Follow June through twists and turns as you solve cases, collect evidence, and crack codes. With clever puzzle games, layered storytelling, and immersive world-building, this is one of the most addictive mystery games. Whether searching for a key clue or following a trail of secrets, every 
chapter offers something new to explore - ideal for fans of brainteasers and problem-solving puzzle games.

🏡Design & Decorate Your Estate
Design and upgrade your luxurious island manor as you uncover clues to solve thrilling mysteries. Complete scenes to earn rewards, unlock new areas, and bring life to your estate. The perfect blend of home design and detective work gives this mystery game its own unique charm among other hidden object games and creative puzzle experiences.

🧩Relax & Stay Sharp
June’s Journey offers relaxing gameplay with just the right level of challenge. Solve mystery puzzles, search for clues, and enjoy the soothing pace that makes every adventure rewarding. It’s the ideal choice for fans of search and find games, murder mystery games, and cozy adventure games. Whether you're uncovering hidden objects or unravelling secrets, there's always something new to discover.

🕵🏻‍♀️Join Detective Clubs
Join forces with other players in Detective Clubs and take your investigations to the next level. Compete in special spot the difference events, share strategies, and search together to top the leaderboard. Whether you're collaborating or going solo, there's always a new mystery game moment to experience.

📚New Chapters Weekly
The search adventure never ends! Every week brings new chapters packed with fresh hidden object scenes, compelling stories, and clever twists. Stay engaged in a mystery game that’s always evolving—part narrative, part puzzle game, and pure adventure.

June's Journey is intended for those 18 and older. Welcome to Jane's farm of dream! Explore and redesign your own farmtown!

Goodville is an original blend of classic farming simulator game with an emotional well-being care app. It combines the gaming industry expertise with the scientific approach to address mental health issues from a completely new angle.

Help Jane to renovate her family farm and discover all the secrets of Goodville. You will meet a bunch of vivid characters, who will assist you on each step of your journey, so you won’t stay alone with the challenges that Goodville farm has to offer.

description: Hello Neighbor is a stealth horror game about sneaking into your neighbor's house to figure out what horrible secrets he's hiding in the basement. description:
Rec Room – The Ultimate Sandbox for Creativity & Fun! 🏗️

Rec Room is the craziest and coolest sandbox game where EVERYONE can create! Rec Room is perfect for anyone looking to craft and refine their skills to make something one-of-a-kind! Whether you're new to making games or a seasoned creator, Rec Room makes designing and playing your own games easy, social, and FUN for everyone!

🛠️ Build Games & More – Solo or with Friends

Jump into an immersive social experience where you can create alongside friends from around the globe. Collaborate on your own games and design unique hangout spaces, all with easy-to-use tools! Creation in Rec Room is real-time, which means you and your friends can work together seamlessly to bring your ideas to life. 

🕹️ Publish & Play – Instantly

Press ‘Publish’ and watch your creations go live across all devices, from VR to mobile - instantly available for a global audience to enjoy. Make an action-packed multiplayer PVP game, a spooky horror escape room, or just a chill place to hangout with friends. Whatever you create, there’s an engaged community of players and creators waiting to jump in and check it out.

🎨 Express Your Creativity With No Limits

From designing your avatar’s perfect outfit to customizing your own dorm room to 3D modeling and building entire games, there’s no limit to what you can create. Use Rec Room’s powerful in-game tools to bring your dream project to life. Level up your creation skills with simple tutorials, live classes, and building clubs so that you can create anything you want!

📱 Create Anytime, Anywhere – VR & Beyond

Whether you're on a VR headset, PC, console, or mobile, Rec Room gives you seamless cross-platform building—no pro skills or external software needed!  Full voice-chat and cross-play make creating and playing with friends on different devices a breeze.  

💰 Find Your Audience & Earn Rewards!

Showcase your work, monetize your creations, and grow a fanbase! Whether you're designing custom avatar items & games, founding a club, hosting live events, or just hanging out and making friends - Rec Room gives you the tools to turn creativity into endless possibilities.

Join the most welcoming creative community and start your creator journey today! 🚀

description:
Legendale: Island Adventure is a story-driven adventure game and one of the most atmospheric island adventure games for players who love exploration, quests, and magical worlds. This island adventure game combines classic adventure gameplay, cozy farming, a warm fable story, and safe family fun into one unforgettable experience.

This is not just a farming game. This is a real adventure game set on a mysterious island. Among all island adventure games, Legendale focuses on exploration, quests, story, and discovery. Every step on the island is part of your adventure. Every quest is part of your fable. Every action moves your adventure forward.

If you are searching for true island adventure games with deep adventure mechanics, Legendale is your perfect adventure game.

🗺️ Adventure Exploration on a Living Island
Explore forests, beaches, caves, villages, and hidden paths. Island adventure games are built around exploration, and this adventure game gives you freedom to discover secrets, treasures, and stories. Your island adventure is full of mystery and wonder.

📜 Adventure Quests & Fable Stories
Complete exciting adventure quests inspired by magical fable tales. Every quest is part of your island adventure story. Adventure games become powerful when story matters, and Kegendale is a story-driven adventure game where your family writes its own fable.

🌱 Farming Inside Your Adventure
Farming is part of your adventure, not a side activity. Grow crops, harvest resources, craft items, and use farming to unlock new adventure areas. In Kegendale, farming supports your island adventure and makes your adventure game progression natural and rewarding.

🧩 Adventure Puzzles & Challenges
Solve light puzzles, help island characters, and unlock new zones. Island adventure games feel alive when they include puzzles and challenges, and Kegendale delivers soft adventure challenges perfect for family play.

👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Family Adventure Game
Legendale is a family-friendly adventure game. The calm pace, friendly visuals, and positive fable messages make it perfect for family adventures. Parents and kids can explore the island, complete adventure quests, and enjoy farming together. This is one of the safest island adventure games for family gaming.

🏝️ Create Your Own Island Adventure World
Customize your island, expand your farm, decorate locations, and shape your own adventure world. Island adventure games are strongest when players can build their own story, and Kegendale gives you full creative control over your island adventure.

✨ Why Legendale is a true island adventure game:

Real adventure game with quests and exploration

Story-driven island adventure gameplay

Magical fable atmosphere

Farming that supports adventure progression

Adventure puzzles and discovery

Perfect for family adventure gaming

One of the most complete island adventure games

Legendale: Island Adventure is a full adventure game experience. It is an island adventure, a quest-based adventure game, a fable story, a farming simulation, and a family adventure in one world.

If you love adventure games, island adventure games, quest games, and story adventures, this is the adventure game you are looking for. Every island adventure quest brings excitement. Every farming action builds your adventure. Every fable moment creates family memories.

Start your adventure today.
Explore the island.
Complete adventure quests.
Live your fable.
Build your farm.
Share your island adventure with your family.

Legendale: Island Adventure is the adventure game that turns an island into a world of quests, farming into adventure progression, fable into story-driven gameplay, and family time into a true island adventure.

Do you like Legendale?
Join our community for updates, contests, and game tips:
https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100063473955085

description:
Heroes vs. Hordes: Survival RPG is the ultimate roguelite action RPG where heroes battle endless waves of monsters. Enter the world of Midlantica, a horde of monsters threatens to consume everything. Heroes rise from every faction — ⚔️ warriors, 🔮 mages, 🗡️ assassins, and ⚙️ inventors — to fight back and improve the chances of survival. Only your hero, their skill, upgrades, and strategy can hold the darkness at bay.

Survive Endless Waves
Face relentless hordes of enemies in real-time survival battles. With simple one-hand controls and roguelite mechanics, every run is a new test of skill. No idle auto-play — every dodge, upgrade, and combo is your decision.

Deep Strategy and Custom Builds
Unlock and master over 100 heroes, weapons, and skills. Create unique loadouts, discover synergies, and craft your perfect build. Do you prefer tanky warriors, glass-cannon mages, or clever trap-based fighters? Choose your hero wisely, it’s key to your survival. 

Progression That Never Ends
Earn loot, collect shards, and unlock upgrades every time you play. Evolve your hero and their weapons to become legendary. In this roguelite survival rpg, your squad grows stronger with each battle. Progression is power, and the grind always rewards.

Explore Epic Fantasy Worlds
Explore Midlantica’s cursed forests, frozen wastelands, and arcane battlefields. Each chapter brings new monsters, epic boss fights with unique attack patterns, and hidden treasures to uncover. Can you be the survivor of challenging waves of monsters and bosses?

Multiple Game Modes
•  📖 Campaign – Classic roguelite progression with bosses and story chapters
•  ⏳ Adventure – 30-day event mode with exclusive heroes and weapon resources
•  🏟️ Arena – Competitive weekend arenas with unique upgrade materials
•  🐉 Boss Brawl & Hero Clash – League challenges against rival players and massive bosses
•  🤝 Guild Missions – Team up with allies, fight together, and climb global leaderboards

Why Players Choose Heroes vs. Hordes
•  Survival action RPG with roguelite progression
•  100+ unlockable heroes, weapons, and skills
•  Endless waves of monsters and epic boss battles
•  Monthly live events and new content updates
•  Competitive arenas, leagues, and guild missions
•  Global community of players sharing builds and strategies

Heroes vs. Hordes combines the thrill of survival with the depth of RPG progression. Every run is different, every upgrade matters, and every hero can become a legend survivor.
Midlantica’s fate rests in your hands. 

Can you outlast the endless horde and rise as a true hero? Download Heroes vs. Hordes today and begin your fight.

Stay Connected
👍 Like us on Facebook: facebook.com/heroesvshordes
📸 Follow us on Instagram: instagram.com/heroesvshordes
🐦 Follow us on X: x.com/heroesvhordes
💬 Join the community on Discord: Heroes vs. Hordes Official Server

Supported by the German Federal Ministry for Economic Affairs and Climate Action as part of the federal funding for video games.

description:
Fun Farm and Paradise Resort, farming adventures, epic races, themed seasons and mini-games – all this and much more awaits you at Farmington dream farm!
Welcome to the vibrant world of Farmington!
Here you are the owner of your own farm! Explore and develop new amazing territories, expand and decorate your farm. Build different beautiful buildings and factories. Breed adorable domestic animals. Grow crops and produce goods. Fulfill the orders of your citizens, interact with your neighbors: exchange items and trade products of your farm.

Exciting balloon races and epic events, themed seasons and many other farm adventures with valuable rewards await you. Being a farmer has never been so exciting!
Farmington features
🏆 Smart farm. Become the best farmer! Take care of animals, get a bumper crops, increase the production of your eco-products and compete with other farmers.

🌴 Paradise resort. Serve tourists and build the resort of your dreams! Improve and speed up your tourist services to get more coins and experience.

🏠 Shop. The citizens come here to buy your farm's produce. You earn in-game coins and experience by selling goods.

📦 Cargo drone. Serve citizens from other farms by delivering your goods by drone. Don't forget to come back for a reward, the drone always brings something valuable!

💻 Workplace. The Book of Recipes – your biggest pride – is kept here! By increasing your skill and experience, you improve production recipes, and your goods become of higher quality and in demand.

🌽 Market and Advertisements. This is a wonderful place on your farm where you can meet your neighbors from other farms and exchange goods and resources with them.

🚚 Electric Truck. It brings a list of urgent and interesting orders. When you fully load the van with the right products, you will receive a magical gem!

🙋🏻‍♂️ Assistant Danny. Please contact him if you need to find any goods or resources for your farm.

🤝 Friends and clubs. Play with your Facebook and Game Center friends, make new friends, help each other in the household and earn rewards and bonuses. Join communities – clubs. This will allow you to participate in special weekly events and compete against other clubs. You can search for friends in the game via Facebook.

Farmington is completely free to play. However, some in-game items can be purchased for real money. You can switch off this option in your device settings.

The application will be great to run on your mobile devices and requires an active Internet connection to play. The game uses the social mechanics of the Facebook network.

Join us on social networks and stay up to date with news and upcoming events:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/FarmingtonGame
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/farmington_mobile/

If you have questions, we kindly ask you to contact our support team: farmington_support@ugo.company

description:
A game made from block that you can transform and build into whatever you can imagine. 
Use resources to build or go hunt for tools and fight of the danger.
You can explore an infinite, randomly generated world with friends or alone, building, exploring biomes, and making friends (or enemies) with mobs. You have the freedom to play however you please! Take a creative journey while building and growing your village or exploring a vast open world! 

*How to play:
- Use your imagination to build 
- Search for new block resources to create new tools and build
- Defend your base from monsters

* Key Features:
- Engaging construction gameplay: Build diverse structures, from houses to iconic Towers!
- Enjoy life build simulation in this entertaining game.
- Vibrant pixel graphics for a delightful block visual experience.
- Personalize your experience by choosing your character!
- Adopt and play with various animals for added fun!
- Incredible 3D structures building
- Many pets and unlimited exploration, adventure
- Many types of block to custom build
- Build your own tools

Now go play one of the top building games!
Play with your animals! Adopt an elephant, a cat, or a dog! In this building game there are no monsters like in other block games, so you can concentrate on building the greatest structures or exploring the environment.

Play a multiplayer build game and visit your pals co-op and build block to play together.
Get exploring now! You can go see the city your allies (or enemies) have build and assist block in completing its construction. Playing multiplayer is a ton of fun!

* Creation and Commerce:
No mods or launchers needed. Customize block, design unique furniture, or fulfill building blueprints. Sell your creations for gems!

* City-Building Fun:
Immerse yourself in this simulator and build your dream city!

Presented by Senspark Studio.

description:
*TRY BEFORE YOU BUY* Play the free experience, then unlock the whole game with one payment and no ads.

Join Bluey in a new adventure game with story by the show's creator. Set off on an epic quest featuring new characters, fully animated cutscenes, and hand-drawn environments inspired by the Dragon and Escape episodes in  the TV series. Explore vibrant worlds, solve trifficult puzzles and complete fun challenges, all as you embark on Bluey’s Quest for The Gold Pen.

A NEW BLUEY STORY
Dive into an adventure game fueled by a brand-new story from the show's creator! Discover the humor and warmth Bluey brings in this fun new game for the family, with story by Joe Brumm.

EMBARK ON A HEART-WARMING ADVENTURE
Bluey is drawing at the table when Dad suddenly yoinks the Gold Pen she needs! Bluey sets off on an adventure with the whole family. Mum designs the strange and distant lands, Dad rocks up on his cool bike as self-declared King Goldie Horns, and Bingo transforms into her honk-happy alter ego — Bingooose! Away they go on an exciting quest to retrieve the Gold Pen – and have heaps of fun along the way. 

GO ON FUN-FILLED CHALLENGES
Uncover hidden treasures, solve playful puzzles, and take on delightful mini-quests as you glide, fly, and skate through each level. Interact with quirky characters and help little lost critters return to their homes. Search near and far for goosefood and beads to unlock new moments in the adventure as you keep Bluey moving onwards in her quest.

EXPLORE HAND-DRAWN WORLDS
Explore lively levels brimming with snowy mountains, golden beaches, lush forests, and iconic Australian landscapes. Each environment is packed with vibrant details and opportunities for discovery.

FUN FOR EVERYONE
Just like the animated series, Bluey’s Quest for the Gold Pen sparks laughter and encourages players of all ages to discover through play. Packed full of trifficult puzzles and wholesome moments, this is an adventure for the whole household.

About Bluey
Bluey is a loveable, inexhaustible six year-old Blue Heeler, who loves to turn everyday family life into boundless, playful adventures, developing her imagination and resilience as she goes.

About Ludo Studio
Ludo Studio is a BAFTA, multi-Emmy® and Logie award-winning Australian studio that creates and produces original scripted drama, animation and digital stories that are authored by incredible local talent, distributed globally and loved by audiences everywhere. ludostudio.com.au


BLUEY TM and BLUEY character logos TM & © Ludo Studio Pty Ltd 2018. Licensed by BBC Studios. BBC logo TM & © BBC 1996

Star girl: Love story is one of the leading choices puzzle games out there that will get you hooked on!

You're now in or no longer in a relationship, or you're never in love. Romance, drama, suspense, surprise and more - Star girl: Love story would take you to the most impressed puzzle game ever and offer a huge collection of love story with for any taste. This is the app where you can say: My choices – My love story.

See potential lovers, jealous rivals and unexpected puzzles come to life in Star girl: Love story, then you're gonna consider making choices, this one or that one, for what is coming next to Star girl and her boyfriend.

Once you start you will want to keep solving the upcoming puzzles. This is the best puzzler out there!

Each level is unique. So many different puzzles for you to solve.

Yes, it actually is.
⭐ Do you want to be a Star?
Good luck!

Whether you are a fan of puzzlers, word games, trivia games, quiz games, brain teasers, or just want to have a good time, then Star girl: Love story is the game for you!

description:
🕳️ Break Through the Ages in This Epic Runner Adventure!

Time is fractured and chaos reigns! In Age Breakers, race through history, defeat enemies, and evolve your army through different eras — from cavemen to futuristic warriors!

⚔️ GAME FEATURES:

🕰 Progress Through Timelines
Break the time barrier! Smash through the Stone Age, Medieval times, Space Age and more.

🧠 Strategic Unit Collection
Gather and upgrade unique units with special abilities. Form the ultimate squad for each timeline!

💥 Powerful Upgrades & Evolutions
Collect resources to power up your troops and evolve them into stronger versions as you advance through time.

Easy to play, hard to master! Swipe, dodge, collect, and conquer enemies in an adrenaline-fueled runner experience.

🗺️ Epic Boss Battles
Face massive time guardians that stand between you and the next era!

🌎 No Time Machine Needed
Enjoy vibrant visuals and dynamic environments based on different historical periods.

Pop's World has been nothing and empties since the Princess got kidnapped into the jungle. But then, the adventure begins.
Your task is to help Pop run through the mysterious jungle, jump over the obstacles, and super evil monsters save the beautiful Princess at the final destination of the adventure.

How to play:
+ Use buttons to jump, move, and fire
+ Eat mushrooms and items to become stronger and defeat all monsters
+ Collect all coins and bonus items to get more points and buy additional items in store

Features:
+ Beautiful high-resolution graphics
+ Smooth user interface
+ Music and sound effects
+ Suitable for all ages
+ Phone and Tablet support

+ Additional collectibles, coins, shields, and more

Pop's World -  Running game is a challenging and exciting classic platform game style. Conquer it and have fun now

description:
Jump – Dash – Smash!
Join an epic 3D adventure where a brave panda fights to protect his home forest from an army of rampaging robots!
Master agile platforming moves—from double jumps to dash attacks—and conquer tricky traps, puzzles, and boss battles.

🌿 Game Features

⭐ Smooth Platforming Action
Experience precise controls and satisfying combat across handcrafted 3D levels.

⭐ Epic Boss Fights
Face off against unique mechanical bosses guarding each area. Time your attacks and learn their patterns to win!

⭐ Vivid Forest World
Explore lush jungles, ancient temples, snowy peaks, and mechanical dungeons filled with secrets.

⭐ Upgrade & Customize
Collect coins to unlock skills, outfits, and skins for your panda hero.

⭐ Easy to Play, Hard to Master
Simple touch controls for all ages—perfect for casual players and fans of classic platformers.

⭐ Offline Mode
Enjoy the adventure anywhere, anytime—no Wi-Fi required!

🕹️ How to Play

Tap to jump over traps.

Hold to dash and break obstacles.

Defeat robots and gather items to unlock new areas.

Time your ground smash to knock out enemies and bosses.

💡 Pro Tips

Use a mid-air dash to cross long gaps.

Watch your shadow to land accurately.

Smash enemies right before they attack to trigger bonus damage.

🔥 Coming Soon

New levels and seasonal events.

Fresh skins & accessories.

More bosses and secrets to discover!
