🧠 Train your brain while you unwind after a long day.

Did you know Solitaire is one of the world's most popular classic card games? It has stood the test of time for generations, captivating players with its blend of strategy and relaxing path. If you've enjoyed playing Solitaire card games on your computer, get ready to fall in love with this mobile version!

💡 Key Features 💡
♠️ Enjoy a wide variety of Solitaire games on the go, no matter where you are.
♠️ Switch between Landscape and Portrait modes for your comfort.
♠️ Compatible with a wide range of devices
♠️ Move cards with a simple tap or a smooth drag-and-drop motion.
♠️ Available in multiple languages, making it accessible to Solitaire players worldwide.

⭐️ Special Features ⭐️
♦️ Left-handed mode—perfectly tailored for left-handed Solitaire players.
♦️ Auto-complete option for lightning-fast wins in Solitaire card games.
♦️ Dive into thrilling daily Solitaire challenges and unlock incredible rewards.
♦️ Personalize your Solitaire game with various card faces, backs, and backgrounds and win animations!
♦️ Need a helping hand? Use hints to overcome tricky situations in Solitaire.
♦️ Choose between Solitaire Draw-1 or Draw-3 cards mode for added challenge.
♦️ Keep track of your progress with detailed personal statistics in Solitaire games.
♦️ Experience the classic Solitaire card mode or try exciting Solitaire game variations like Solitaire Race! 🏁

😎 How to play this free original solitaire card game 😎
To solve this FREE Solitaire card puzzle, move all solitaire cards of 4 suits - hearts, diamonds, spades and crosses to the Solitaire Foundations. There is one deck - 52 solitaire cards in the classic Solitaire game.

You must stack solitaire cards by suit, from Aces to King (A, 2, 3 and more). You can also move solitaire cards between columns, and stack solitaire cards in descending order and differentiate between red and black suits. You can move the stack of solitaire cards by dragging the whole stack to another column.

Solitaire game or Patience game is an addictive solitaire card game from the Classic Solitaire collection, which is similar to other Solitaire card/board games, such as Cube, Freecell, Spider, Tri-Peaks, Pyramid, Golf, Mahjong and Yukon.

Classic never fades. Solitaire, or Patience is the best way to relax and pass the time, play it anytime, anywhere with patience and insistence. You would love playing this free Solitaire card game.

Think you have what it takes to claim the title of Solitaire King or Queen? 👑🤴 Don't miss out—download now and join the ever-growing community of Solitaire players on Android.

Whether you're a lifelong card game fan or discovering rummy for the first time, this version delivers the perfect mix of tradition and ease of play.

How to Play Rummy 500:
- Draw a card from the deck or discard pile
- Form sets (3+ cards of the same rank) or runs (3+ in sequence of the same suit)
- Meld cards to score points
- Discard one card to end your turn
- Be the first to reach 500 points to win

Each round is fast, fun, and full of strategy. Watch your hand, track your score, and outplay the AI!

 Features:
- Classic Rummy 500 rules and scoring
- Smart AI with progressive difficulty
- Large cards for better readability

description:
Play Nostal Solitaire: Card Games today and experience the ultimate classic Solitaire card game!

This game is beginner-friendly yet challenging for experts, catering to players of all skill levels. Immerse yourself in the nostalgic atmosphere of Nostal Solitaire while giving your brain a workout. Embark on a journey of strategic thinking in this unique game. Enjoy a variety of exciting and challenging puzzles that will transport you back to the golden era of card games.

Classic Solitaire, also known as Patience, is great to relax & train your brain. How to play this free original solitaire card game?
The goal is to get the four suits built onto the foundations from aces up through kings. Deal out 28 cards in seven piles as follows: The first pile is one card; the second has two cards, and so on up to seven in the last pile. The top card of each pile is face up; all others are face down. Any movable card may be placed on a card next-higher in rank if it is of opposite color. When there is no face-up card left on a pile, the top face-down card is turned up and becomes available.
You would absolutely love playing this free Solitaire card game.

description:
Play the Best Classic Solitaire – Fun, Relaxing, and 100% Free!

Enjoy the timeless charm of Classic Solitaire (Klondike Solitaire)—the most popular FREE card game in the world! Whether you have a few minutes to unwind or want to play for hours, this original Solitaire card game isperfect for relaxing your mind anytime, anywhere—no wifi needed, and no cash required!

Solitaire, also known as Patience, is a highly engaging solitaire card game from the Classic Solitaire collection. If you love classic card games like Freecell, Pyramid, Yukon, Cube, or Mahjong, you'll definitely enjoy this smooth, polished, and addictive Classic Solitaire experience! Perfect for unwinding and exercising your brain, Classic Solitaire offers a relaxing yet challenging experience. Come prove your skills and become a true Solitaire Master!

🃏 How to Play Classic Solitaire

Classic Solitaire is an easy and addictive game with simple rules: 
- Solve the FREE Solitaire card puzzle by moving all 52 solitaire cards of 4 suits - hearts, diamonds, spades, and clubs to the Solitaire Foundations.
- Stack solitaire cards by suit, from Ace to King (A, 2, 3 and more). You can move solitaire cards between columns, stacking them in descending order while alternating red and black suits (e.g., a black 8 could only be followed by a red 7). Only a King can be placed in the Free Column. Simply drag stacks of cards to move them between columns.

🎯 Why Millions Love This Free Solitaire Game

- Authentic Classic Solitaire: Enjoy pure, classic gameplay that's both challenging and irresistibly fun.
- Daily Challenges: Complete new challenges every day and earn trophies, coins, and special rewards.
- Various Backgrounds and Effects: Choose from dozens of themes, including animals, flowers, patterns, and more to personalize your game experience.
- User-Friendly Controls: Play right or left-handed and choose between draw-1 or draw-3 mode for a customized experience.
- Dynamic Winning Animations: Celebrate your victories with lively, animated effects that add extra fun and excitement to your Solitaire game!
 - Play Anytime, Anywhere: No wifi needed! Enjoy a free offline Solitaire game—perfect for travel, commuting, or relaxing at home.

💎 Fair and Enjoyable Solitaire for Everyone

We're committed to giving you a great experience:
- Winnable Deals
       Play deals where you know there is at least one solution.
- Useful Props
       Unlimited Deal! Unlimited Undo Option! Unlimited Hints! Great Bonus Awards!
- Generous Rewards
       Earn bonuses as you play and unlock more features.

If you're searching for a top-tier card experience on your mobile device, look no further than Classic Solitaire. Created by the talented team at Big Cake Apps, this free-to-play game has quickly become a massively popular title with 12M+ downloads worldwide. howToPlay:
To begin playing Classic Solitaire, first download and install it from your device's app store. The game is available on Android. When you first launch the app, you'll be guided through an introductory sequence that teaches you the fundamentals. Pay close attention to these early instructions, as they lay the foundation for more advanced strategies you'll use later in the game.

Start your Classic Solitaire journey by completing the introductory campaign, which teaches you the basic mechanics and gives you starter cards. Build your first deck by focusing on a single strategy rather than trying to include everything. As you earn new cards, experiment with different combinations to find synergies. Don't disenchant rare cards too hastily — the meta can shift and make previously weak cards powerful.

General tips for Classic Solitaire:

• Complete the daily missions every day for consistent rewards and progression.
• Join the community forums or social media groups to learn strategies from experienced players.
• Don't spend premium currency on cosmetics early on — save it for gameplay-impacting items.
• Take advantage of limited-time events, as they often offer the best rewards.
• Experiment with different strategies and approaches — the meta isn't always the most fun way to play.
• Be patient with progression and enjoy the journey rather than rushing to the endgame.

description:
Solitaire Master - Card Game offers a fresh take on the classic solitaire experience, specifically designed with older players in mind. Enjoy the timeless fun of solitaire through a user-friendly interface optimized for both tablets and smartphones. Known also as Patience, solitaire is a single-player card game that provides hours of entertainment. Play the popular and authentic solitaire game whenever and wherever you like! It's the perfect way to challenge your mind and sharpen your skills, with the opportunity to become a solitaire expert. Try this classic, fun Patience card game now!

Why Choose Solitaire Master - Card Game?
- Larger Card Display: With bigger fonts and cards, this game offers a comfortable visual experience that’s easy on the eyes, perfect for tablets and phones.
- Classic Gameplay: Enjoy the timeless charm of traditional solitaire with familiar rules that all players know and love.
- Mental Workout: Boost your brainpower and enhance your problem-solving skills while having fun with this solitaire game, turning every round into a satisfying challenge.
- Easy-to-Use Interface: The simple and intuitive design makes it easy to navigate, ensuring a fun experience for both beginners and seasoned players.

How to Play Solitaire Master - Card Game:
Playing solitaire is simple! Just tap or drag the cards to organize them in descending order, alternating colors and suits. Move cards to the foundation, building each suit from Ace to King. For added difficulty, choose to draw either one or three cards at a time.

Key Features of Solitaire Master - Card Game:
- Option to Draw 1 or 3 cards
- Unlimited hints and undo options
- Left-handed mode available
- Various card designs and backgrounds
- No Wi-Fi required
- Play anytime, anywhere
- A fresh solitaire experience at your fingertips
- Enhance your skills and enjoy the challenge

Don’t wait any longer! Download the game today and embark on an exciting adventure of strategy, skill, and endless fun! Let the challenge begin!

description:
Might & Magic Fates TCG is an original strategy card game rooted in the legendary Might & Magic universe. Build your deck, summon mythical creatures, cast devastating spells, and lead iconic heroes into battle. Each card is part of a living legacy shaped by decades of fantasy lore and player imagination.

Enter the Sea of Fates, a fractured multiverse where timelines collide and destinies unravel. Lead the charge with powerful heroes, command diverse armies, and outwit your opponents in tactical duels that reward creativity and skill. Whether you're a longtime fan or new to card games, Fates offers a fresh take on a legendary world.

COMMAND MIGHT & MAGIC HEROES
Lead with iconic heroes drawn from the Might & Magic universe. Progress each hero like an RPG character, unlocking game-changing abilities and evolving your strategy over time.

COLLECT HUNDRED OF CARDS
Build your arsenal with powerful spells, creatures, and artifacts — as well as unique hero cards and strategic building cards that shape the battlefield in your favor.

MASTER ICONIC FACTIONS
Fight for the glory of Haven, raise the dead in Necropolis, unleash Inferno’s fury, or command the arcane power of Academy.

PLAY WITH STRATEGY AND FREEDOM
Craft your own tactics with a flexible deckbuilding system, then test your skill in battles where synergy, positioning, and timing matter more than luck.

PLAY SOLO OR PVP
Climb the ranks in competitive multiplayer or enjoy seasonal solo events and faction-based challenges.

FREE TO PLAY, FAIR FOR ALL
Play and progress without paywalls. In-game purchases are optional and never required to compete.

Your cards are more than tools. They are echoes of fallen worlds, bound to fate.
Are you truly prepared to discover your fate?

description:
⭐️ Why Play Water Match?

-Brain Training: Sorting sharpens observation, and solving puzzles boosts logic and intelligence—exercise your brain while having fun!  
-Stress Relief: A relaxing way to unwind. Color sorting + exciting events = a calming yet thrilling experience.  
-Sensory Delight: Visual and auditory triggers gently stimulate your senses, offering deep mental relaxation through gameplay!  
-Sleep Aid: An immersive experience that provides a sense of achievement, 🌙 helping you escape pre-sleep anxiety.  
-All-Age Fun: Casual puzzle gameplay with simple taps—kids and adults alike love the satisfaction of a perfect pour!


⭐️ Game Highlights: Immersive Gameplay That Keeps You Hooked

-Endless Content: Tons of water sort levels, limited-time events, and clever twists (mysterious colors, covered bottles) keep the game fresh.  
-Perfect Difficulty Curve: Start with easy beginner levels, then tackle pro stages with hidden colors—brain training that never gets dull.  
-Visually Friendly: 8 vibrant water shades, sleek bottle designs, and smooth animations (lifting, rippling water) make every tap a visual treat.  
-Sound Satisfaction: 🎵 Crisp glass clinks, delicate water-pouring sounds, and soothing music blend for a deeply relaxing audio experience.  
-Play Offline: Enjoy anytime, anywhere—no internet needed. Pause at will to fit your busy schedule.


⭐️ Water Sorting: Simple Moves, Smart Strategies

-Tap and Play: Just tap the bottles to enjoy the flow of colorful water—instantly relaxing!  
-Collect Colorful Bottles: 🎁 Fill bottles with the same color, and they transform into gift bags. Collect them all for a huge sense of achievement!  
-Brain-Teasing Fun: Which bottle to pour first? Which to save? Every move is a key step in solving a clever puzzle!  
-Helpful Empty Bottles: Empty bottles are your secret helpers. Unlock more to conquer the toughest challenges!


⭐️ In-Game Events & Leaderboards: Fun for Everyone

Whether tackling solo challenges, racing in real-time contests, or battling in guild wars, there’s a mode for you.Team up, compete with friends, and climb the leaderboard to show off your skills.Social fun turns solo puzzles into group celebrations!  


⭐️ Useful Tools: Beat Tough Levels

-Undo: Made a mistake? Rewind to your last move (keeps unlocked secrets) and retry stress-free!  
Shuffle: Stuck? Randomly rearrange a bottle’s water layers (even mysterious ones) to spark new ideas.  
-Add Empty Bottle: Place an extra empty bottle in a gap—new solutions appear instantly!


Download Water Match Now—Your New Go-To Water Sort!

Use logic to conquer levels, 🏅 race friends up the leaderboard, and let your brain play free in this colorful world!

description:
My Talking Tom 2 brings your favorite virtual cat with more adventures, mini games, and unique pets to collect.

What You'll Do 🐱
Take care of Talking Tom by feeding him, making sure he gets enough sleep, and keeping him happy.

Gameplay Features
Pet Care & Daily Activities 🛁
Feed Talking Tom his favorite food and watch his reactions. Help him brush his teeth and use the bathroom. Make sure he gets enough sleep and playtime. Daily routines keep play varied and help build habits through play.

Dress Up & Customization 🎨
Choose different outfits to express Talking Tom's personality. Dress him casually for a day at home, give him sporty gear for games, or pick fancy clothes for special occasions. Change his fur colors and decorate his house with furniture.

Mini Games Collection 🎮
Play action-packed mini games to earn coins and unlock rewards:
Space Trails: Navigate through obstacles
Sky Race: Compete in high-speed challenges
Dunk-a-Pet: Score baskets
Build Your Plane: Create and fly custom aircraft

Each mini game offers different challenges and rewards.

World Exploration ✈️
Visit magical destinations. Each world has unique activities, items to collect, and surprises to discover:
Candy Kingdom: Sweet adventure in a sugary paradise
Pirate Island: Hunt for hidden treasures
Underwater Home: Explore beneath the waves
Magic Forest: Mystical world and secrets
Cyber City: Futuristic challenges
Dragon Kingdom: Lunar New Year fantasy world

Pet Collection 🐾
Talking Tom has unique pet friends that join your adventures. Each pet has its own personality and behaviors. Care for them, play with them, and watch them interact with your favorite cat.

Skills & Learning 🏀
Teach Talking Tom new abilities like playing drums, shooting basketballs, and boxing. As he learns, you unlock new animations and interactions.

Why Families Choose This Game
Fun for the Whole Family 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦
My Talking Tom 2 offers screen time that is both entertaining and meaningful. Players learn about caring for pets, managing daily routines, and responsibility through play.

Safe & Offline Play ✅
Playable offline after installation (some features may require an internet connection), making it perfect for car rides, flights, or anywhere without an internet connection. The content is safe, lighthearted, and fun for all ages.

Perfect For Pet Lovers 🎯
This game suits anyone who enjoys virtual pet experiences, life simulation gameplay, or caring for digital companions. Whether you're 5 or 50, there's something enjoyable about watching Talking Tom grow.

Technical Details
Offline Play: No internet required after installation.
Free to Play: Download for free with optional in-app purchases.
Regular Updates: Seasonal content, new outfits, and special events.
Auto-Save: Pick up right where you left off.

What Makes It Special 🎉
Talking Tom responds to your actions in real time. The combination of pet care, exploration, mini-games, and customization means you are never doing the same thing twice.

Start your adventure with the iconic talking cat.

description:
Explore a world full of delicious match-3 puzzles and endless fun! Blast through thousands of challenging levels in this timeless puzzle game from King. Match candies, conquer jelly, toffees, and jam, and uncover sweet surprises in every puzzle.

Classic Match-3 Gameplay with Fresh Twists

- Discover unique game modes like Gummy Dragons and Bubblegum Pop. 
- Match and blast your way through matching levels full of sugar-coated fun.
- Master tricky puzzles and create explosive combos to clear the board!

Brain-Boosting Challenges & Special Events

- Daily Rewards: Log in every day to claim free boosters and extra lives.
- Time-Limited Events: Compete in themed challenges and win exclusive prizes.
- Tournaments & Leaderboards: Crush more candies than your friends and rise to the top to become the ultimate match-3 master!

Bonbon Blitz Your Way Through Extra Sticky Levels

- Use powerful boosters like Bonbon Blitz, Lollipop Hammer, and Jelly Fish to solve puzzles and boost your score.
- Stuck on a level? Boosters and extra moves will help you blast through any obstacle.

Play Offline or Online, Anytime and Anywhere

- No internet, no problem: Enjoy offline gameplay and keep the fun going wherever you are.
- Ad-free fun means uninterrupted candy-matching bliss!

Connect with Friends & Join the Candy Kingdom

- Share lives, compare scores, and see who’s the match-3 master in your friends circle.
- Connect your game to Facebook to sync progress, compete with friends, and unlock exclusive rewards!

Discover more from King

Looking for more brain-teasing fun? Try Candy Crush Soda Saga or Farm Heroes Saga for fresh twists on classic match-3 puzzles. Or dive into sweet solitaire action with the new Candy Crush Solitaire!

Candy Crush Saga is free to play, but optional in-game items require payment. You can turn off the payment feature in your device’s settings.

description:
Get ready for 'Offline Games': fun for all ages, and a mental workout too! This offline game collection is like an overflowing toy box packed with more than 20 unique minigames. It's designed for classic game enthusiasts, puzzle lovers, and challenge seekers. And the best part? You don't need an internet connection to enjoy it!

Our array of Number Games like 2048 and 2248 will get your neurons firing. Engage in these numeric challenges and strive to hit the highest scores. They're perfect for keeping your mind sharp, and they're addictive, too! You'll find yourself coming back to beat your own scores time and again.
Word Games are a great way to expand your vocabulary and language skills. With word guess and word finder, you'll embark on an adventure through a maze of letters, uncovering hidden words, and building your own word lists. It's a fun way to learn new words, and the challenge will keep you hooked for hours.

Feel the adrenaline rush with our Thrilling Challenges. Step into the mind-bending world of Minesweeper, where every click could be your last. Or play Hangman, where you'll rack your brains to guess the right letters before time runs out.

We've brought back some of your favorite Classic Memory Games. Engage your brain in our sound memory game, a modern twist on the classic 'Simon Says'. For a bit of nostalgia, we've also included the much-loved game of Snake.

For the serious strategists and thinkers out there, our Mind Benders section is perfect. Chess and Chess puzzles will provide a mental workout and fun brain training. Hone your strategic skills, and take on the challenge to become the grandmaster.

Our Two-Player Games offer the perfect opportunity for a friendly showdown. Go head-to-head with AI in games like Checkers, Pool, or Tic Tac Toe, even when you're in airplane mode. It's fun gaming action whenever you want, wherever you are! See if your friends can do better!

Our collection includes brain-stimulating games like Tap Match, Solitaire, Sudoku, Wood Blocks, 4 in a row, and the Sliding Puzzle in our Keep Them Thinking section. These games are designed to keep your mind sharp and focused, and they're also a lot of fun.

Ever wanted to try your hand at an exotic game? Now you can, right from your device, with Mancala in our Exotic Games section.

'Offline Games' is a fantastic app for all ages - kids, teens, adults, and even seniors. It offers a fun, engaging, and stimulating gaming experience without the need for an internet connection. Whether you're on a long journey, stuck at home, or in the middle of a flight, you're never far from the action with 'Offline Games'. It's the perfect app to challenge yourself, pass the time, and have loads of fun.

Remember, with 'Offline Games', you don't need an internet connection to play. You can enjoy your favorite games anytime, anywhere. Say goodbye to those dull moments and welcome endless entertainment with 'Offline Games'. Who knew having fun could be this easy? Jump in and start playing today!

description:
Join your Facebook friends and millions of players around the world for prize-winning spins as you build village after village on your journey to the top!

Do you have what it takes to be the next Coin Master?

Get ready to team up with friends for thrilling expeditions or join forces with a crew of fellow players. You’ll always find a new adventure with an ever-changing lineup of special events, packed with unique challenges and exciting surprises to keep you on your toes!

Spin and Attack!

Spin the wheel to discover your fortune- or attack friends' villages and steal their coins to help build your own! You can also win gold sacks to build magnificent villages throughout the game and advance through thousands of levels. Don't forget to win shields from the wheel too—you'll need them to guard your village from other players trying to attack you back! Become the Coin Master with the most impressive villages and the most incredible prizes!

Embark on Fun Expeditions with Friends!

Earning coins from the prize wheel isn’t the only way to gather resources—you can find them on exciting expeditions too! Team up with friends to journey to other villages and uncover treasures that will help you build and advance to the next level. You never know what wonders you'll find in the next world you explore!

Collect all the Cards!

It's not always about the coins; it's about the treasure too! Collecting cards completes sets and unlocks the next village in your grand adventure. With thousands of villages to create and build, each completed set is a step forward in your journey. With every village you master, your wins will be even greater.

Play and Create Teams with Friends!

Trade your cards with our online community to collect them all! Join our fast-growing interactive Facebook community to meet new friends, create your dream team, earn big rewards, and trade treasures to help each other build and progress faster!

Coin Master is free on all devices with in-app purchases


Coin Master is intended for amusement purposes only and does not offer ‘real money’ gambling, or an opportunity to win real money or real prizes based on game play. 
Coin Master does not require payment to download and play, but it also allows you to purchase virtual items with real money inside the game. You can disable in-app purchases in your device’s settings.

Follow Coin Master on Facebook and Instagram for exclusive offers and bonuses!

Instagram: instagram.com/coinmasterofficial/

description:
Roll, raid, and rule the board!
 
Welcome to Coin Master: Board Adventure, where every dice roll takes you closer to riches, revenge, and all-out fun! Collect coins, attack villages, build your empire, and explore wild new boards full of surprises. It’s not just a board game—it’s a bold adventure!

ROLL THE DICE, MAKE YOUR MOVE
Every roll brings a new opportunity. Land on coin tiles to stack your fortune, shields to protect your village, or raid tiles to steal from your Coin Master friends! Just like a real board game, your strategy—and a little luck—will decide your fate.

BUILD YOUR WAY TO THE TOP
Use your loot to upgrade buildings, complete themed villages, and grow your collection. From fantasy kingdoms to tropical getaways, every board you explore unlocks new worlds to conquer.

ROLL AND ATTACK
Landing on the attack tile? Time to strike! Attack villages across the map, break through defenses, and send your rivals back to square one. It's payback with a bonus.

COLLECT COINS, RAID FRIENDS
Raid your friends’ boards and dig up massive treasures. Want more? Steal coins, disrupt their progress, and climb the ranks. Being nice won’t win you this game!

COLLECT CARDS, COMPLETE SETS
Love collecting? Get hooked on rare card games! Gather themed cards as you play, complete sets, and earn powerful rewards. Trade with friends to finish your collection faster.

PLAY CASUAL, COMPETE HARD
Whether you're in for a quick spin or an all-day binge, Coin Master: Board Adventure delivers fun at your own pace. Play solo or team up with friends to swap cards, trade boosts, and dominate events together!

Why Players Love Coin Master: Board Adventure:
★ Exciting roll and attack gameplay
★ Strategic board movement
★ Build epic villages and unlock new boards
★ Collect coins and spend them wisely
★ Battle friends
★ Fun and competitive casual game style
★ Addictive card collecting and trading
★ Constant events, bonuses, and surprises

It’s your turn.

Are you ready to roll your way to glory, fortune, and board domination?
Download Coin Master: Board Adventure now and become the master of the board!

description:
✨ Welcome to Dice Dreams – The Magical Board Game Adventure! 🎲👑
Join millions of players around the world in this dreamy dice adventure! Roll your dice, collect coins, and play your way to the top! Build your beautiful board, attack rivals, and steal their coins to grow your dice kingdom. 💖

🎯 ROLL, ATTACK & COLLECT COINS!
 Every dice roll is a chance to play, collect coins, and expand your board. 💥
 Use your slingshot to attack other boards and raid for their shiny coins!
 Got attacked? Get your revenge and show everyone who rules the dice game! 👑

💞 PLAY WITH FRIENDS & FAMILY
 It’s always more fun to play together! Connect with your Facebook friends and join the ultimate dice adventure. 🌈
 Share gifts, compete in tournaments, and laugh your way to victory in this exciting social dice board game.
 Build boards, collect coins, and celebrate every win with your favorite people! 🎉

🌟 COLLECT STICKERS & WIN BIG
 In Dice Dreams, every dice roll can reveal magical stickers full of surprises. ✨
 Complete your albums to unlock treasures and earn bonus coins to power up your dice game!
 The more you roll your dice, the more rewards you’ll discover. 💝

🐾 FEED YOUR PET & LEVEL UP
 Your adorable pet is waiting to join your dice journey! 🐶🍪
 Feed them cookies, watch them grow, and earn special game bonuses as they level up.
 Your cute little friend will bring you luck and joy in every dice board game adventure! 💕

🎉 DAILY EVENTS, TOURNAMENTS & CHALLENGES

 Join daily dice tournaments, win free rolls, and collect massive coin rewards.

💌 CONNECT & SHARE THE FUN

 Collaborate, compete, and make every game moment more magical together. 💖
 Whether you’re building your dream board or stealing coins from rivals — the fun never ends when you roll the dice!

description:
Join hundreds of millions of players for FREE and start the fun slingshot adventure now! Team up with your friends, climb the leaderboards, gather in clans, collect hats, take on challenges, and play fun events in all-new game modes. Evolve your team and show your skills in this exciting Angry Birds game !

Get to know all of the iconic Angry Birds characters and experience the fun gameplay that has captured the hearts of millions of players.

Features:

● DAILY CHALLENGES. Have a minute? Complete a daily challenge and earn some quick rewards.
● LEVEL UP your characters with feathers and up their scoring power. Build the ultimate flock!
● JOIN A CLAN to take down the pigs with friends and players around the world.
● COMPETE in the ARENA. Compete with other players for some friendly bird flinging fun and prove who is the best.
● COLLECT SILLY HATS. Collect hats with different fun themes to level up your flock’s fashion game and take part in special events.
● IMPRESS THE MIGHTY EAGLE in special challenges in Mighty Eagle’s Bootcamp and earn coins to use in his exclusive shop.
● LOTS OF LEVELS. Play hundreds of levels with more added in regular updates and limited time events.
● LEADERBOARDS. Compete with your friends and other players and prove who is the best on the global leaderboards.
● CHOOSE YOUR BIRD. Choose which bird to put in the slingshot and defeat the pigs with strategy!
● MULTI-STAGE LEVELS. Play fun, challenging levels with multiple stages – just watch out for Boss Pigs!
● FREE to download! --- Angry Birds 2 is completely free to play. Although Angry Birds 2 can be downloaded for free, there are optional in-app purchases available.


 ---

description:
Gear Defenders – A Revolutionary Placement-Adventure Game: Build Your Tactical Fortress, One Gear at a Time
Tired of strategy games that demand endless grind? Meet Gear Defenders – a fresh blend of "idle collection" and "strategic adventure" that lets you effortlessly generate powerful troops with simple taps, assembling your very own war machine block by block.
【Craft Your War Engine Like a Puzzle】
Place soldiers around the Power Core, and watch them work like magic to continuously spawn combat units. From basic infantry to elite knights, every troop is a "gear" in your fortress – drag, drop, and strategize to build the ultimate defense line！
【Unlock 10+ Troop Types】
On your adventure, you’ll unlock over 10 unique soldier types: resilient infantry, long-range archers, shield bearers, and even legendary magic knights… Each troop boasts distinct skills and upgrade paths. Level up, enhance, evolve – transform ordinary squads into elite forces, and watch your fortress’s power soar to take on tougher foes.
【100+ Challenging Levels】
Over 100 meticulously designed levels pit you against tricky enemies: goblins with cunning traps, mummies cursed with dark magic, yetis raging with brute strength… Each enemy faction wields unique attack patterns, while battlefields range from narrow canyons to sprawling plains.Every troop combination could be your winning move.
Whether you’re a casual player craving relaxed placement or a hardcore strategist obsessed with tactical depth, Gear Defenders has something for you. Build your war machine with a flick of your finger, witness the growth of your forces from tiny to formidable, and embark on your gear-driven adventure today – download now!

description:
Going Balls: The Ultimate Speed and Balance Challenge! 🚀

Are you ready for a high-speed runner game that tests your reflexes and mastery of physics? Download Going Balls today and experience the most thrilling arcade adventure on mobile! Join millions of players worldwide in this addictive hyper-casual hit.

What is Going Balls? ⚽️🏃‍♂️

Going Balls is an exhilarating, fast-paced ball game where your main goal is to control a rolling ball and guide it safely to the finish line on increasingly difficult tracks. It’s the perfect blend of a precision puzzle game and a heart-pounding speed challenge.

How to Play:
Swipe your screen to control the speed and direction of your ball. Master the art of balance as you navigate narrow paths, dodge unexpected obstacles (challenge!), and collect coins 💰 to unlock new balls and environments. 
The simple controls hide a deep, skill-based arcade experience!

Key Features: The Ultimate Rolling Adventure! 🚧

* Dozens of Challenging Levels: Race through diverse worlds, from sky-high platforms to treacherous industrial zones. Each level offers a unique challenge that will keep you coming back for more!
* Realistic Physics Engine: Feel the thrill of true physics-based gameplay. Every roll, jump, and acceleration feels incredibly smooth and responsive. Balance is key to surviving!
* Customize Your Ball: Collect thousands of coins and unlock a massive collection of cool, colorful, and unique balls. Personalize your runner experience! 🎨
* Intuitive One-Finger Control: The ultimate pick-up-and-play hyper-casual design. Simple to learn, but incredibly hard to master - perfect for quick bursts of fun or long endless sessions.
* Tons of Obstacles: Avoid swinging hammers, tricky ramps, massive wrecking balls, and unexpected gaps. Your speed and precision are your only allies!

Why You'll Love Going Balls! 🎉

Going Balls is more than just a runner - it's an immensely satisfying experience. The rush of barely making a jump, the joy of collecting a huge stack of coins, and the feeling of accomplishment after conquering a nearly impossible challenge makes this game highly addictive.

We’ve optimized the gameplay for pure fun!
* Instant Thrills: Short, intense levels make it ideal for quick breaks.
Skill Progression: You can feel yourself getting better at speed and balance with every attempt.
* High Replayability: The pursuit of the perfect, flawless run is endless!

Download Now - Totally FREE! 💯

Ready to roll? Get the full arcade experience without spending a dime! 
Going Balls is totally free to download and play. Experience the ultimate physics-based challenge today!

Download Going Balls and start your speed adventure now! ⬇️

Swallow gorgeous high-stack tiles with your black hole and watch them collapse in the most satisfying way. Perfect for fans of relaxing black hole games featuring beautiful visuals, rewarding mechanics, and endless replayability.

🎨 Gorgeous Tile Designs
Collect stunning 3D shapes including hexagons, cubes, circles, triangles, stars, diamonds, and geometric patterns! Each tile features unique colors, smooth gradients, metallic finishes, and detailed textures.

Watch as these colorful tiles fall into the hole and create mesmerizing high stacks. The artistic diversity makes these tile games stand out among puzzle competitors.

📚 Satisfying Collapse Mechanic
The magic moment arrives! Swallow all tiles with your black hole and enjoy the spectacular collapse animation. 

The ASMR-quality feedback makes these black hole games incredibly addictive. Players worldwide describe the collapse as the most rewarding part of these tile games.

🌈 Customizable Black Hole Skins
Unlock over sixty unique visual themes as you progress. Personalize your black hole experience with stunning designs:

Each black hole skin transforms the visual presentation. Special animations show when tiles fall in with custom particle trails, glow effects, and matching sounds. Premium themes feature advanced rendering and dynamic lighting.

🧩 Progressive Puzzle System
Hundreds of hand-crafted levels test your skills in these tile games. Each puzzle introduces innovative challenges:

Simply drag your black hole across the board with pixel-perfect precision. Responsive touch controls feel natural and fluid on all devices.

howToPlay:

description:
This is a ball game where you have to make the numbers on the balls bigger.

Control the balls with your finger to make them merge with other balls of the same number!
Each time the balls are combined, they get bigger and change color.
The number on the ball starts from 2, when it merges with a ball of the same number, the numbers are added and grows up to a maximum of 2048.
Even children can complete the game, but it is very difficult to reach the goal at 2048.

Control the balls so it does not fall off the course or hit obstacles and try to reach 2048!
Can you make a rainbow-colored 2048 ball?

Rules Description:
Swipe to move the ball.
When you hit a ball with the same number on it as the ball you are controlling, the number will increase.
The numbers on the balls increase from 2-4-8-16-32-64-128-256-512-1024-2048.
If the ball fall off the rail, you will restart from the beginning.
If you get stuck on a thorn, your number will decrease.
The higher the number of balls, the greater the reward at the goal.

description:
🎉 ARE YOU THE PUZZLE MASTER WE'VE BEEN LOOKING FOR? 🎉
Dive into the most colorful and captivating puzzle adventure of the year! If you love the brain-teasing challenge of games like Screw Master 3D and Screwdom, but are ready for a fresh, new theme, then Unravel Master is your next addiction! Get ready to untangle, strategize, and solve your way through a world of wonderfully tangled yarn.


🧶 Unravel Master: Your Zen Wool Challenge! 🧶
This isn't just a game; it's a relaxing escape for your mind. Unravel Master combines mind-bending logic puzzles with a soothing, stress-free atmosphere. The challenge will test your brain, while the vibrant visuals and smooth gameplay will calm your soul.

🌈 A VIBRANT WORLD OF COLORFUL YARN 🌈
Forget cold metal screws and bolts! Immerse yourself in a visually stunning universe filled with brilliant, soft lines of yarn. Each level is a unique piece of art, waiting for a master strategist like you to bring order to the beautiful chaos. Watch as tangled messes transform into satisfyingly neat patterns with every correct move you make!

🤔 HOW TO PLAY: Unravel The Yarn! 🤔
The goal is simple, but the challenge is immense:
Examine the Yarn Object: Carefully observe the overlapping and knotted lines of yarn.
Pick a Pin: Tap a color of yarn and collect 3 of the same color to an empty socket.
Unravel Strategically: Plan your moves to unravel the yarn one by one. A wrong move could make you lose the level!
Achieve Perfection: Successfully unravel all the yarn to complete the level and feel the ultimate satisfaction!

✨ AWESOME FEATURES ✨
🧠 HUNDREDS OF BRAIN-BOOSTING LEVELS: With a difficulty curve that starts easy and becomes fiendishly complex, you'll never run out of puzzles to solve. If you conquered Screwdom, you'll find a familiar and exciting challenge here!
🎨 STUNNING 3D GRAPHICS & RELAXING SOUNDS: Lose yourself in the smooth animations and a calming soundtrack. It's the perfect game to play to de-stress after a long day.
👆 INTUITIVE ONE-TOUCH CONTROLS: So easy to learn, you can start playing instantly. But don't be fooled—mastering the art of the unravel requires true skill.
💡 HELPFUL HINT SYSTEM: Stuck on a particularly tricky knot? Just like in top puzzle games like Screw Master, our hint system is here to give you a little nudge in the right direction.
🏆 DAILY CHALLENGES & REWARDS: Come back every day for unique new unraveling levels and earn amazing rewards to keep your experience fresh and exciting!

Ready to swap screws for string and become a legend of untangling? Your next favorite puzzle game is just a tap away.
Download Unravel Master NOW for FREE and prove you are the ultimate puzzle-solving champion! 🚀

description:
Get ready for an exhilarating ride with Pick Me Up 3D, the ultimate car traffic game that's all the rage among fun car game enthusiasts! As a taxi game that combines elements of crazy taxi adventures and taxi driving games, this game is perfect for those seeking a thrilling road trip game experience.

As a talented chauffeur in this taxi simulator, you'll navigate through highway traffic and busy city streets, making it one of the most dynamic traffic games out there. The essence of Pick Me Up 3D lies in its simplicity and excitement, distinguishing it from other traffic-driving car simulators. It's not just about driving; it's about mastering the art of car run and traffic escape.

The game's core challenge is to pick up passengers and navigate through a maze of traffic jam scenarios, making it one of the most engaging taxi run games. Whether you're a teenager looking for a fun car game or an adult seeking to unwind with games traffic-based, Pick Me Up 3D offers an ideal blend of relaxation and excitement.

This game stands out in the realm of traffic driving games by offering a unique twist on the typical taxi game. Players must exhibit precision and timing, akin to playing in a traffic run scenario, making it a standout among taxi games.

In Pick Me Up 3D, every level is a new adventure, offering endless fun and challenges. Whether you're dodging through traffic jam puzzles or cruising in your taxi simulator, this game is sure to keep you engaged. And for those who love car traffic games, Pick Me Up 3D offers an immersive experience that's hard to beat.

So, if you're in search of a game that combines the thrill of highway traffic, the strategy of traffic escape, and the excitement of a road trip game, look no further than Pick Me Up 3D. Download it now and join the ranks of players who enjoy the rush of a good traffic run!

🎁 Friday is gift day! Pop into the Post Office to collect the gifts we’ve sent you on the conveyor belt, including decorations, furniture, and even pets! Keep an eye out for gift bonanzas where we give away a LOT of items from previous years.

More than 60 million girls and boys play on Toca Boca World, the very first game of its kind – that's a LOT of kid-testers making sure the fun never ends!

description:
Welcome to Toca Boca Hair Salon 4! Grab your clippers, hair dye, and makeup and get creative in this fun hair cutting game from the award-winning studio Toca Boca. Everything you love about haircut games, makeup games, and dress-up games, you’ll find here!

Toca Boca Hair Salon 4 is part of Piknik – one subscription, endless ways to play and learn! Get full access to the world's best preschool apps from Toca Boca, Sago Mini, and Originator with an Unlimited Plan.

Toca Boca Hair Salon 4 isn’t just any salon game, it’s your personal space to explore bold hairstyles, play with face paint, and dress up characters in funky outfits. For fans of hair cutting games, makeup games, or anything that lets you express yourself, we’ve gotcha covered!

💇‍♀️ HAIR & BEARD STATION
Up your hair game with your own salon! Use clippers, curling irons, and colorful dyes in every shade of the rainbow. Trim beards, regrow hair, and explore different textures and hairstyles for endless fun.

Flaunt your creativity with makeup and face paint. Go glam with mascara, eyeshadow, and blush, or go bold using face paints to draw right on your character. It's an all-in-one makeup game and art studio!

👒 STYLE STATION
A new look deserves a new outfit! Pick from tons of clothes, stickers, and accessories to match your character’s fresh hairstyle and makeup. Step out of the salon looking camera-ready!

📸 PHOTO BOOTH
Choose a background, watch them strike a pose, and snap a picture of your character’s new style! Save a picture of your masterpiece and return to styling their hair, makeup or outfit anytime.

✨ SHAMPOO STATION
Ready for a fresh start? Head over to the shampoo station to wash away makeup, face paint, and hair dye. Then towel off, blow dry, and create something new in one of the most popular salon games available!

description:
Kids love fun coloring games, and this Coloring Game is one of the best free coloring book and painting apps for children!

Coloring Games is filled with fun, colorful, and creative drawing and painting tools that help kids of all ages enjoy creating art on your mobile device. There are multiple modes the whole family can enjoy, including paint by numbers, color by numbers, doodling modes, and free coloring books of all types. Whether your kid is a toddler or a preschooler, they're bound to have fun with this free coloring game!

Coloring Games was built specifically for children. It has an easy to understand interface kids as young as one year old can use. They'll have fun using the drawing, painting, and learning games at their disposal, while parents can watch the looks of joy on their faces as they color in the pages with a wide variety of paints.

There are a ton of coloring mini-games to play in Coloring Games, including:

1. Fun Paint - Tap to fill in the blank coloring book pages with a dozen bright and fun colors!

2. Color Fill - Use a wider variety of colors and options to paint the pictures, including stickers, glitter, crayons, and cute patterns.

3. Drawing - Draw on a blank slate with a full palette of colors ready to go.

4. Glow Pen - Paint with neon colors on a dark background. A fun way to create unique artwork!

5. Number Paint - Color-by-numbers to fill in an amazing picture, one paint shade at a time!

Coloring Games comes with a number of features that help adults monitor their child's progress. You can easily add profiles for each child, customize settings to make color activities easier or harder and more. Best of all, the coloring game is completely FREE to play. There are no ads, no in-app purchases, and no paywalls to fight with, just tons of safe, educational fun for kids.

Preschoolers, toddlers, families, and boys and girls of all ages will love the simple but engaging fun of Coloring Games. It's easy to start coloring with just a few taps on the screen, and maybe your child will create a miniature masterpiece!

Note to parents:
When creating this game, our goal was to craft a unique and fun experience perfectly designed for children. We're parents ourselves, and we know how ads and paywalls can get in the way of families enjoying playtime together.

Coloring Games is completely free. You won't find any in-app purchases or third party advertisements, just a great coloring book app you can play with your children. We don't want our kids consuming hundreds of ads while they learn, and we think other parents agree with that, as well!

Thank you for taking the time to experience fun learning and coloring apps with your children. Spread the word so more parents can share wholesome entertainment with their families, too!

Best wishes from the parents at RV AppStudios

description:
Join Bluey, Bingo, Mum and Dad in this fun LEGO® game packed with building, challenges, and the chance to play out fun moments from the show! 

This game has a selection of themed play packs featuring both LEGO® DUPLO and LEGO system bricks. Each pack is specially designed to provide balanced play, with a careful combination of creativity, challenge, and open-ended digital play experiences. 

GARDEN TEA PARTY (FREE) 
Host a tea party with Bluey, Mum and Chattermax—but there’s plenty more fun to be had! Run a mud pie restaurant, build a tree from LEGO bricks, and conquer obstacle courses. 

LET’S GO FOR A DRIVE (FREE)
Bluey and Dad are off on a road trip to see the Big Peanut! Pack the car, stay ahead of the Grey Nomads, create your own window entertainment, and build unforgettable memories along the way. 

BEACH DAY
Bluey, Bingo, Mum and Dad are heading to the beach for a day out! Splash in the surf and ride the waves. Build the sandcastle of your dreams and then follow footprints to dig up clues and uncover buried treasure. 

AROUND THE HOUSE
Enjoy a playdate with Bluey and Bingo at the Heeler’s house! Play hide and seek, make mischief with the Magic Xylophone, cross the living room when the floor is lava, and build toys in the playroom.
  
The app is thoughtfully designed to align with young children’s developmental needs, supporting both emotional and cognitive growth through engaging, meaningful play. 
 
SUPPORT   
  
For any questions or assistance, please reach out to us at support@storytoys.com.   
 
ABOUT STORYTOYS   
   
Our mission is to bring the world's most popular characters, worlds, and stories to life for children. We make apps for kids that engage them in well-rounded activities designed to help them learn, play, and grow. Parents can enjoy peace of mind knowing their kids are learning and having fun at the same time.   

PRIVACY & TERMS 
 
StoryToys takes children's privacy seriously and ensures that its apps comply with privacy laws, including the Child Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA). If you would like to learn more about the information we collect and how we use it, please visit our privacy policy at https://storytoys.com/privacy. 

Read our terms of use here: https://storytoys.com/terms.
 
SUBSCRIPTION & IN-APP PURCHASE 
  
You can buy individual units of content via in-app purchases. Alternatively, if you subscribe to the app you can play with EVERYTHING. We regularly add new stuff, so subscribed users will enjoy ever-expanding play opportunities. 

This app contains sample content that is free to play. If you subscribe to the app you can play with EVERYTHING. While you are subscribed you can play with EVERYTHING. We regularly add new stuff, so subscribed users will enjoy ever-expanding play opportunities.

Google Play does not permit in-app purchases and free apps to be shared via Family Library. Therefore, any purchases you make in this app will NOT be shareable via Family Library.

description:
Pet lovers and animal games fans, step into the magical world of super cute Fluvsies! Here, you'll find fluffy virtual creatures, the sweetest companions you can collect, nurture, and play cute animal games with! Join in, hatch eggs, take care of fluffy pet babies, and let the endless fun of animal games begin!

🐣 HATCH & CARE
Hatch every pet from a surprise egg! Just pop two cute Fluvsies into a magical merging machine, and voila – a brand-new egg is ready to hatch! Grow your virtual pet, care for him, and play cute animal games together!

🐼 COLLECT ALL PETS
Did you know that Fluvsies have their own tiny pets? Collect all kinds of them: from cute bouncing pandas to adorable flying birdies! Each virtual pet is unique, and they love playing cute animal games with Fluvsies, so collect them all and let the fun begin!

Explore new virtual places and find great toys to play animal games with! Hatch, grow, and then watch every virtual pet bouncing around on an inflatable castle and jamming on cute musical instruments! Oh, and keep your eyes on magical boxes – they’re full of surprises and can't wait to be opened!

description:
Welcome to the Ice Cream Games for Kids, the ultimate ice cream shop for kids who love ice cream! Dive into a world of dessert making and culinary creativity with our brand-new cooking games for kids. Our icecream games feature 5 delightful ice cream maker games that will keep your little ones engaged, entertained, and eager to explore the wonderful world of icecream. From running an ice cream shop to creating delectable ice cream cones, cups, sundaes, and gelato, there’s something for all kids and toddlers, 2-5 year olds!

Ice Cream Shop
Step into the bustling world of the ice cream shop where your child can make and serve flavorful ice cream. They will serve customers, scoop various flavors, and add toppings to create the perfect dessert. The ice cream shop is designed to give kids the joy of making people happy with delicious treats. Watch as they handle different ice cream orders and prepare them in the ice cream truck!

Ice Cream Cone
Get ready to create the most colorful and delicious ice cream cones ever! In this game, children can choose from a variety of flavors and colors to make their ice cream cone dreams come true. They can add toppings like sprinkles, chocolate chips, and fresh fruit to make each cone unique. The ice cream cone game fosters creativity and imagination as kids mix and match flavors and decorations to craft their perfect treat.

Ice Cream Cup
In the ice cream cup game, kids can layer different flavors and sauces to create a visually stunning and delicious dessert. This game encourages kids to think about flavor combinations and presentation, helping them develop a keen eye for detail. Whether it’s a classic vanilla and chocolate combo or a more adventurous mix of fruity flavors, the ice cream cup game offers endless possibilities for fun and learning.

Ice Cream Sundae
Who doesn’t love a good sundae? In the ice cream sundae game, kids can create towering sundaes with multiple scoops of icecream, sauces, and toppings. This game is all about indulgence and creativity, allowing kids to go wild with their sundae creations. Every sundae can be a masterpiece from hot fudge to caramel drizzle and from nuts to cherries. The ice cream sundae game is an excellent way for kids to express themselves through their culinary creations.

Gelato
Travel to Italy with our gelato game, where kids can learn to make this creamy and delicious frozen dessert. Gelato differs from regular icecream in its smoother texture and intense flavors. In this game, kids can experiment with traditional flavors like pistachio, chocolate, and strawberry or invent their own unique gelato recipes. The gelato game is a beautiful way for kids to explore different cultures and cuisines, all while having fun.

Why Choose Ice Cream Games for Kids?
Our cooking games for kids are designed to be educational and entertaining. Each game in the Ice Cream Club helps develop essential skills such as creativity, hand-eye coordination, and basic math. Plus, they’re an excellent way for kids to learn about different ingredients and recipes in a fun, interactive way.

- Educational and Fun: Every game in the Ice Cream Club is designed to teach kids something new, whether it’s running an ice cream shop, creating the perfect ice cream cone, or making creamy gelato.
- Encourages Creativity: With endless combinations of flavors, toppings, and decorations, our games let kids express their creativity and imagination.
- Easy to Play: Our cooking games for kids are simple and intuitive, making them accessible for children of all ages.

Experience the joy of running an ice cream shop, serving from an icecream truck, creating delightful ice cream cones, crafting beautiful ice cream sundaes, and making creamy gelato. The Ice Cream Club is more than just a game – it’s a world of sweet possibilities where your child can learn and grow while having fun.

Download Ice Cream Club today and let your kids embark on a sweet adventure with our exciting cooking games for kids.

description:
👶 Welcome to My Baby Care - your go-to educational app designed for soon-to-be parents and those stepping into the world of parenthood! Whether you’re expecting your first baby or just want to brush up on your skills, My Baby Care offers a fun and informative way to prepare for the exciting journey ahead.

🍼 This app isn’t just for parents - it’s for anyone looking to learn the essential skills needed to care for a baby. From feeding and dressing to playing and sleep training, My Baby Care gives you the tools and knowledge to feel confident and ready when your little one arrives. It’s more than just a game - it’s a guide to real-life parenting!

🍽️ Feed Your Baby: Learn the basics of bottle-feeding and breastfeeding, and understand how to create feeding schedules that work for both you and your baby.

🌙 Establish Sleep Routines: Discover tips for managing your baby’s sleep patterns, including creating calming bedtime routines.

❤️ My Baby Care is more than just an educational tool - it’s your companion in getting ready for parenthood. With expert advice, easy-to-understand tips, and step-by-step guides, you’ll feel prepared for any situation that comes your way.

✨ Why choose My Baby Care?

🎓 Educational & Fun: Learn essential parenting skills in a relaxed, engaging way.

description:
The Official Gabby's Dollhouse App!

Everything is possible in DreamWorks Gabby’s Dollhouse:

- Explore a home full of games, surprises and magic.

- Unbox cute, miniature and exciting surprises.

- Discover new hobbies and make friends with the most adorable kitties.

- Sing, paint, cook, plant, craft and have fun with Gabby at your side.

FEATURES

- Play through 7 colorful cat-themed rooms: the dreamy bedroom, the bubbly bathroom, the cozy craft room, the sweet kitchen, the colorful playroom, the funky music room and the magic “fairy tail” garden.

- Meet the cutest kitties ever: Pandy, Cakey, MerCat, DJ Catnip, Baby Box, Carlita, Kitty Fairy and Pillow Cat.

- Try, test and learn: Make as many fun experiments as you like - nothing can go wrong in Gabby’s Dollhouse!

- Be creative: Cook sprinklicious cakes, draw colorful pictures and come up with cool tunes.

EXPLORE ALL SEVEN ROOMS

- The Craft Room: Have a crafty-rific time with baby Box making bead necklaces, folding paper into Beautiful origami shapes, and even painting the Gabby cats!

- The Bathroom: Dive in with Mercat and share her passion for Spa Science by making your own bubbly potions!

- The Fairy garden: Follow Kitty Fairy to her garden of wonders with the most enchanting activities from star drawing to singing with flowers!

- The Kitchen: Do you want to Bakey with Cakey? Make snacks, cakes and smoothies with the resident cupcake cutie.

- The Playroom: Let’s go for a ride with Carlita and her outgoing personality. Race around the playroom, build castles, play basketball or even tennis! Games galore in the playroom!

- The Bedroom: Cuddle up with Pillow Cat, hear your favorite bedtime story, play dress up with your cat friends!

- The Music Room: Always dreamt to be a cool kid and play with a band? Time to get loud and try all kinds of instruments: piano, xylophone and mixing board await! Join DJ Catnip and make all your musical dreams come true!

SUPPORTED DEVICES
This app supports devices running Android 6 and above.
Updates may affect compatibility.

DreamWorks Gabby's Dollhouse app is subject to the Play Store terms and conditions.

description:
NETFLIX MEMBERSHIP REQUIRED. AD-FREE, UNLIMITED ACCESS FOR NETFLIX MEMBERS.

Unleash your creativity in the salon and whip up any style you can imagine. Get creative with makeup, face paint, hair and beard tools and much more! Whether you choose a character and create a brand-new look you've dreamed up, or just see where the tools take you, each makeover is an adventure. 

CUT, COLOR AND STYLE AT THE HAIR AND BEARD STATION
Trim, shave and even re-grow hair anywhere on your character's head. This station has all the hot tools you need for curling, straightening and texturizing. Or grab the bottles of hair dye and choose any color of the rainbow for a bold new look. Your hair salon, your rules! 

GET CREATIVE WITH MAKEUP AT THE FACE STATION
Play around with makeup in every color for endless makeover options. Create lush lashes with mascara, and pick a tool to put on eyeliner, eyeshadow or blush. In the mood for a bolder look? Grab the face paints and draw right onto your character's face.

PICK OUT A NEW OUTFIT AT THE STYLE STATION
What's a makeover without some new clothes to go with it? There are hundreds of styles to suit that new look at the style station! Change up your character's outfit, pick out some stickers and add a finishing touch with accessories like glasses and hats. 

SNAP A PIC IN THE PHOTO BOOTH
Choose a background, watch them strike a pose, and snap a picture of your character's new style. You can even save a picture of your character's makeover in a photo book and return to styling them later. 

SCRUB UP SOME SUDS AT THE SHAMPOO STATION
Ready for a fresh start? Wash hair, towel off and blow dry at the shampoo station. Watch their face paint and makeup drip away so you can create a brand-new look at the salon!

ABOUT TOCA BOCA 
Toca Boca is an award-winning game studio that makes digital toys for kids. We think playing and having fun is the best way to learn about the world. Therefore we make digital toys and games that help stimulate the imagination, and that you can play together with your kids.

- Created by Toca Boca.

Please note that the Data Safety information applies to information collected and used in this app. See the Netflix Privacy Statement to learn more about information we collect and use in this and other contexts, including at account registration.

description:
Become a City Hero!

City Patrol is an entertaining game that introduces young children to the rescue and special services and their work.


Thoughtfully designed for children:

2.5D style graphics, simple and intuitive controls, and a large city and countryside with cars, people and animals.


What Can You Do?

Fight Fires: When a fire breaks out in the city, rush in with the fire truck or fly the fire helicopter to help put out the flames.

Clean the Streets: Help clean up the streets by collecting garbage, sorting it, and recycling it into useful items or toys.

Drive a School Bus: Safely transport children to school.

Keep the city in order: Patrol the city with a police car to maintain order.

Assist the residents: use tow truck or cargo vehicle to move goods or help with car breakdowns.

Race for Fun: After rescue missions, it's time to take a break ;) Enjoy racing with your favorite vehicles!


Why play City Patrol?

Teaches sustainability: The game teaches waste sorting, and parents can adjust the sorting colors to match their country's standards.

Develops important skills: The game helps children improve their motor skills, problem-solving abilities, and sense of responsibility.

Variety of tasks: The game includes many different mini-games, ensuring there's something interesting for everyone!

Child-friendly: A simple control system and a safe environment allow children to focus on the game.


Let your child learn and have fun with City Patrol, a game that fosters creativity and social responsibility!

Coloring Club is the perfect place to start your child's creative journey! Featuring coloring games, drawing games for kids, and fun games for kids and toddlers ages 1 to 6, it's an exciting way to nurture creativity and learning in kids. Spark your child's imagination through interactive play and coloring fun! Join the adventure today!

Educational Appstore

description:
Baby Panda's School Bus is a 3D school bus driving simulation game designed for kids. In this driving game, you can not only experience driving a school bus but also simulate driving other cool cars. Embark on an exciting car adventure and feel the driving fun as a school driver, bus driver, fire truck driver, and engineering truck driver!

A WIDE SELECTION OF VEHICLES
You can choose to drive different types of vehicles, including school buses, tour buses, police cars, fire trucks, and construction vehicles! This school bus game uses realistic 3D graphics to restore real driving scenes in detail. From the moment you step into the simulated cab, every acceleration and turn will immerse you in the charm of driving!

INTERESTING CHALLENGES
In the driving simulation, you will be immersed in a series of fun tasks. You'll drive a school bus to escort kids to kindergarten or a tour bus to take them on an outing. You'll also have the chance to drive a police car on patrol, put out a fire with a fire truck, control an engineering truck to build a children's playground, and much more!

EDUCATIONAL GAME
In this school bus driving game, you'll also learn essential traffic rules: before leaving the station, make sure that all passengers on the school bus have fastened their seatbelt; obey traffic lights and give way to pedestrians crossing the road; and so on. The game integrates educational elements into the driving experience, enhancing your awareness of traffic safety without you even realizing it!

Every departure will be followed by an amazing experience, and every completed task adds a thrilling chapter to your adventure story. Play Baby Panda's School Bus now to embark on your 3D simulation driving journey!

FEATURES:
- Perfect for fans of school bus games or driving simulations;
- Six types of vehicles to drive: school bus, tour bus, police car, engineering vehicle, fire truck, and train;
- Realistic driving scenes, giving you a real driving experience;
- 11 kinds of driving terrain for you to explore;
- 38 kinds of fun tasks to complete: catching thieves, building, firefighting, transportation, fueling, washing cars, and more!
-  Freely design your school bus, tour bus, and more;
- Various car customization accessories: wheels, body, seats, and more;
- Meet ten-odd friendly friends;
- Supports offline play!

About BabyBus
—————
At BabyBus, we dedicate ourselves to sparking kids' creativity, imagination and curiosity,and designing our products through the kids' perspective to help them explore the world on their own.

Now BabyBus offers a wide variety of products, videos and other educational content for over 600 million fans from ages 0-8 around the world! We have released over 200 children's apps, over 2500 episodes of nursery rhymes and animations, over 9000 stories  of various themes spanning the Health, Language, Society, Science, Art and other fields.

—————

Visit us: http://www.babybus.com

description:
In Baby Panda’s Supermarket, you can not only enjoy shopping but also play as a cashier and check out items! Apart from that, there are also many fun events for you to join in the supermarket. Shop in the Supermarket Game with your shopping list now!

A WIDE VARIETY OF GOODS 
The supermarket has a wide variety of goods, including over 300 kinds of goods such as food, toys, children's clothing, fruits, cosmetics, and everyday items. You can buy almost anything you want here! Look carefully, on which shelf are the items you want to buy?

BUY WHAT YOU NEED
Go to the supermarket and shop for Daddy Panda's birthday party! Birthday cake, ice cream, some flowers, birthday presents, and more! Next, let's buy some new school supplies for the upcoming school season! Remember to check your shopping list to make sure you've bought everything you need!

SUPERMARKET EVENTS
If you like to cook delicious food and make crafts, then don't miss out on the supermarket's DIY activities! You can cook any popular gourmet food and make any items you like, such as strawberry cakes, chicken burgers, and festival masks. The supermarket also offers claw machines, capsule toy machines, and other facilities for you to try!

SHOPPING RULES
While shopping in the supermarket, you may also encounter bad behavior such as climbing shelves, running around with carts and jumping the queue. Through the vivid scene interpretation and correct guidance, you will learn the shopping rules in the supermarket, stay out of danger, and shop in a civilized way!

CASHIER EXPERIENCE
Want to use a cash register and try scanning and checking out items? In the supermarket game, you can become a cashier, learn the checkout process, and get to know payment methods like cash and credit cards! Learn numbers and improve your math skills while making the shopping experience more fun!

New stories happen in Baby Panda's Supermarket Game every day. Come and have a great shopping time!

FEATURES:
- A two-storied supermarket: a supermarket game especially designed for kids;
- Restores the real scene: 40+ counters and 300+ kinds of goods;
- Enjoy shopping: food, toys, clothes, fruits, electrical appliances, and more;
- Fun interactions: organizing shelves, grabbing toys from the claw machine, applying makeup, dress-up, food DIY and more;
- Nearly 10 families like the Quacky family and the MeowMi family are looking forward to shopping with you;
- Featured holiday decorations to create a lively atmosphere in the supermarket；
- While shopping in the supermarket, you'll learn the rules of safe shopping;
- Trial services: playing with toys, trying a sample, etc.; 
- Cashier service: Become a cashier and manage cash or credit card payments!

About BabyBus
—————
At BabyBus, we dedicate ourselves to sparking kids' creativity, imagination and curiosity,and designing our products through the kids' perspective to help them explore the world on their own.

Now BabyBus offers a wide variety of products, videos and other educational content for over 600 million fans from ages 0-8 around the world! We have released over 200 children's apps, over 2500 episodes of nursery rhymes and animations, over 9000 stories  of various themes spanning the Health, Language, Society, Science, Art and other fields.

—————

Visit us: http://www.babybus.com

description:
Discover fun and easy toddler games in CoComelon: Learn ABCs and 123s!

Built by early childhood experts and inspired by the world-famous toddler YouTube series, this app gives families a safe place for toddlers to play, explore, and learn with JJ, Bingo, Cody, Nina, and the whole CoComelon crew. Every kid-friendly interactive activity is designed for little hands and big imaginations.

LEARN letters, numbers, shapes, colors, and early problem-solving skills through playful, hands-on games.
PLAY with sandboxes, puzzles, coloring sheets, tracing activities, and musical minigames made especially for toddlers and preschoolers.
GROW confidence and curiosity with activities rooted in real early-learning milestones.

Why parents choose the CoComelon learning app for toddlers:
• Designed for preschoolers with simple and accessible frustration-free controls
• Based on popular CoComelon characters and nursery rhymes kids instantly connect with
• Created by early learning specialists using proven educational methods
• Safe and secure with ad-free activities families can trust
• Records progress so parents can understand what their child enjoys most
• Kid-friendly activities are available offline* for gaming on the go

~Easy Curriculum-Based Toddler Learning Games~
From letter tracing to shape sorting, every activity strengthens real skills toddlers need for preschool and kindergarten. Kids can explore open-ended sandboxes, match and solve bright puzzles, experiment with musical soundboards, and more. These toddler-friendly mechanics support fine motor skills, vocabulary, recognition, memory, and early problem-solving.

~Perfect for Travel, Eating Out, Waiting Rooms & More With Kids~
Whether you're using the free version or unlocking all activities with a subscription, CoComelon: Learn ABCs and 123s works offline and is filled with replayable activities, making it an ideal toddler travel app for long trips, busy days, quiet moments, and everything in between. Take your child’s favorite songs, characters and learning games anywhere!

~Simple, Safe & Supportive Screen Time~
Our dedicated Parent Area gives you insight into what your child plays and learns in our closed mobile app environment. View our privacy policy at moonbug-gaming.com/en/privacy-policy.

~New Preschool Content Added Regularly~
Throughout the year our team adds new content so you can start with free activities, and then unlock the full toddler learning library centred on fan-favorite songs like Bath Song, Yes Yes Vegetables, Old MacDonald's Farm, Train Song, and more with a subscription!

SUBSCRIPTION DETAILS:
CoComelon: Learn ABCs and 123s is a preschool kids games subscription app for ages 2, 3, 4 and 5. Whilst the app contains some free toddler games, subscribing will give you unlimited access to everything that the app has to offer, including regular updates with new themed mini games and songs.
Once you confirm your monthly subscription, payment will be charged through your Google Play Store account. Use your subscription on any device registered with your Google Play Store account. Manage your renewal settings or cancel your subscription in your Google Play Store account. description:
READING IS SUPER FUN WITH SUPERFONIK! 
Who says learning to read has to be a chore? Meet Superfonik – the trash-zapping, soda-slurping, space-surfing app that makes reading feel like recess! Perfect for even the most reluctant readers, kids advance through tons of hilarious games that make reading practice ridiculously fun. Get ready to supercharge reading skills with play-powered learning!

**Superfonik is part of Piknik – a bundle of the world’s best apps for kids in one subscription. Unlock fan-favorites from Sago Mini, Toca Boca, and Originator with an Unlimited Plan!**

FUN READING GAMES FOR KIDS: Kids build vocabulary with 800+ words, practice phonics, and learn to read sentences in games like Chicken Pickin’, Tongue Zapper, Baby Burglar, and more! 
PLAY ON THE GO WITHOUT WIFI: Safe and 100% ad-free, kids can learn to read anytime, anywhere – without WiFi or data. 
DESIGNED FOR RELUCTANT READERS: Perfect for beginners or any kid who needs support or motivation to read. Skip the struggle and read like a pro! 
COMICS MEET PHONICS: With the touchable, tappable, sounder-outer tool, kids build the skills they need to read confidently in interactive comics and reading games for kids. 
PROVEN SCIENCE OF READING METHOD: Developed in partnership with literacy experts at the Joan Ganz Cooney Center at Sesame Workshop and Hoot Reading, Superfonik delivers real results – and real fun! 
MOTIVATING & REWARDING: Earn coins for every word mastered, unlock tons of outrageous surprises, and build confidence with every roll of the dice. 
ADAPTIVE LEARNING: With activities that adjust to individual reading levels, kids stay challenged and engaged for best results. 

FEATURES
• Learn over 800 words in 25+ kid-approved games
• Kids learn new words, practice phonics, and build vocabulary with the sounder-outer tool
• Effective in improving early reading & phonics skills with UFLI’s research-backed methods 
• Play downloaded games offline without WiFi & learn on the go 
• Use one subscription across multiple devices for easy family sharing
• Members get early access to new games and releases
• Perfect for beginners, reluctant readers, and any kid learning to read 
• COPPA and kidSAFE-certified
• No ads or in-app purchases for subscribers

Subscription Details

New subscribers will have access to a free trial at the time of sign-up. Users who don’t wish to continue their membership past the trial should cancel before the seven days are up so they aren’t charged.

At each renewal date (whether monthly or annually), your account will automatically be charged the subscription fee. If you’d prefer not to be automatically charged, just head to your Account Settings and turn off ‘Auto Renew’.

Your subscription can be cancelled at any time, without fee or penalty. (Note: you won’t be refunded for any unused portion of your subscription.)

For more information, check out our FAQs.

If you need help, have questions, or want to say ‘hi’, get in touch at support@playpiknik.com.

Privacy Policy

Sago Mini is committed to protecting your privacy and the privacy of your children. We adhere to the strict guidelines set forth by COPPA (Children’s Online Privacy Protection Rule) & kidSAFE, which ensure the protection of your child’s information online.

description:
Enter the world of Block Blast, a fun and free block puzzle game where every move challenges your brain and strategy, rewarding you with satisfying crush effects as you blast cubes away. Whether you're seeking offline relaxation or looking to enhance your logic skills, Block Blast delivers an engaging puzzle experience.

🌟 Why You'll Love Block Blast
🔸 Vibrant Puzzle Adventure: Match colorful blocks on an 8x8 board, solve logic puzzles, and watch the cubes crush in a cascade of color.
🔹 Strategic Combos & Streaks: 
Use your brain to clear multiple lines of blocks in one move for powerful combos. Maintain your streaks to achieve massive scores!
🔸 Casual Yet Challenging: Play at your own pace, relax your brain, or apply deep logic strategies to beat your highest score.
🔹 Offline Fun, No WiFi Needed: Enjoy free block puzzle game anytime and anywhere, perfect for endless fun on-the-go.

💥 Features of Block Blast
● Puzzle Gameplay: Strategically place blocks and cubes, match colors, and solve each challenging level.
● Adventure Mode: Take on progressively challenging puzzles, each level with unique theme jigsaw and visual styles.
● Daily Challenges: Keep your brain sharp with daily logic puzzles and earn exclusive achievements.
● Optimized for All Devices: Smooth, seamless gameplay experience with minimal memory usage—perfect for phones and tablets.

🎮 How to Play
● Drag & Match: Strategically place cubes on the 8x8 board.
● Crush & Score: Complete rows or columns to crush blocks away and earn points.
● Chase Combos: Plan your moves and trigger massive combos for bonus points.
● Stay Strategic: Apply logic and strategy to prevent your board from filling up.

✨ Pro Tips for Puzzle Masters
● Plan Ahead: Visualize your moves to keep the board open for larger cubes.
● Maximize Combos: Match multiple rows and blocks simultaneously to boost your combos.
● Master the Streak: Consistent clears will maintain your fun streaks and enhance your score rewards.

🔥 Jump into the Free Block Puzzle Game!
Ready to test your brain, sharpen your logic, and enjoy hours of offline puzzle fun? Download Block Blast now and embark on an unforgettable block puzzle adventure.
