description:
Cup Heroes: Join the Adventure of a Lifetime! 

Step into the whimsical world of Cup Heroes, where everyday cups turn into mighty heroes on an epic quest to save their beloved Queen! 

This fun-filled adventure will keep you hooked with its charming characters, exciting gameplay, and endless challenges. 

How to Play: 
- Control Your Heroes: Swipe, tap, and drag to navigate your heroes through various obstacles and puzzles. 
- Save the Queen: Your ultimate goal is to rescue the Queen who has been captured by evil forces. 
- Unlock and Upgrade Characters: Collect coins and gems to unlock a diverse cast of characters, each with unique abilities. Upgrade their skills to make them even more powerful and adaptable to different challenges. 

Key Features: 
- Unique Characters: Meet a colourful cast of cup heroes, from the brave Knight Cup to the cunning Ninja Cup. Each character brings their own special skills and personality to the team. 
- Epic Adventures: Explore various enchanting worlds, from mystical forests to fiery volcanoes. Every level is a new adventure filled with hidden secrets and dangerous foes. 
- Challenging Puzzles: Test your brain with mind-bending puzzles that require clever solutions. Use your heroes’ abilities to overcome obstacles and progress through the game. 
- Exciting Battles: Engage in thrilling combat with evil minions and powerful bosses. Use your heroes’ special moves and teamwork to defeat enemies and save the Queen. 
- Beautiful Graphics: Enjoy stunning, colourful graphics that bring the world of Cup Heroes to life. Each scene is meticulously designed to enhance your gaming experience. 
- Daily Rewards and Events: Log in every day for special rewards and participate in limited-time events to earn exclusive items and characters. 

Why You'll Love Cup Heroes: 
- Addictive Gameplay: Easy to learn but hard to master, Cup Heroes offers endless fun for players of all ages. 
- Engaging Storyline: Immerse yourself in a heartwarming story of bravery, teamwork, and the quest to save the Queen. 

Download Cup Heroes now and embark on an unforgettable journey to save the Queen! 
Your cup heroes are waiting for you to lead them to victory!

description:
Dreamland Park
Behind hydrangea bushes in Dog Town lies a starlight-nourished lake—wish ripples glow silver. Residents built it: rainbow track with sparkles, pink vine swing, fireflies as a galaxy. Rotating heart cable cars hide bows; carousel leaves star prints. Puppies run with balloons at noon, warm halos at dusk—a joy haven.
Fairy Tale Forest
A century-old abandoned mine becomes a forest. Black branches twist with color-shifting grass, leaves carved with glowing incantations. Dewy lotus boats drift with petals and paw prints. An evil queen curses a princess puppy to sleep in a black-rose crystal coffin. Brave puppies with badges rescue her.
Strawberry Dessert Workshop
At Cherry Blossom Lane’s end, a pink workshop has a tinkling strawberry wind chime. Star-dew strawberries bubble pink. Grandma Puppy makes soufflés, star tarts, jelly cups. Strays get fish biscuits—sweet warmth.
Sea Train
Built from shipwreck wood and coral, it runs on ocean tracks pulled by starlight, stirring pearl bubbles. An old captain navigates mists and sunsets. It carries longing; night brings waves’ lullaby.
Hot Spring Inn
In a coastal valley, Grandma Puppy’s inn uses hot spring stones. Star springs glow milky white, mixing cherry blossom scent. Pools have heart pillows; warm tea and buns await. A peaceful retreat.
Puppy Cottage
On a cherry-blossom plain, cottages have dandelion roofs and dewdrop windows. Wind chimes ring; interiors have mats and storybooks. Departing guests get guiding flower seeds—soft beds await.
Nursery
At cherry blossom-dandelion border, a nursery exudes warmth. Aunt Puppy has toys and chews. She teaches star-gazing; evening brings cookies, fireflies soothe babies.
Spirit Realm
Above clouds, marigolds and moonlight weave it. Golden light covers petals; a river carries memory boats. Deceased puppies become gentle skeletons. They visit loved ones as fireflies, wait for reunion.
Star Experience Hall
At Rainbow Street’s end, a hall by retired stars has paw spotlights. Puppies sing, walk catwalks, get star badges. No winners—just joy.
Paradise
Beyond clouds, puppy kindness forms Paradise. Cloud carpets have paw prints; star flowers sing. Endless treats and climbing frames. Angel puppies give collars—reunions and warmth.
Woof Hospital
In a pine forest, a hospital has hot spring wards. Star-dew syrup calms nerves. Nurses massage; squirrels bring medicine. Heals wounds, finds homes for strays.
name: My Dog Town: Animal Sim Games
editorsReview:

Brought to life by kunping, this free-to-play rpg game has achieved a growing title that has attracted 193K+ downloads, a testament to its quality and appeal. howToPlay:

Download the game from the Google Play Store or Apple App Store, and once installed, open the app. You'll be greeted with a brief tutorial that walks you through the core mechanics. We recommend completing the full tutorial even if you're experienced with rpg games, as My Dog Town: Animal Sim Games has some unique features you won't want to miss.

Begin your journey in My Dog Town: Animal Sim Games by creating and customizing your character. Choose your class carefully, as it determines your playstyle for much of the game. Complete quests to earn experience points and level up, unlocking new abilities as you progress. Manage your equipment wisely — always check if new loot is better than what you currently have equipped. Don't forget to upgrade your skills at each level-up, focusing on abilities that match your preferred combat style.

• Join the community forums or social media groups to learn strategies from experienced players.

• Take advantage of limited-time events, as they often offer the best rewards.
• Experiment with different strategies and approaches — the meta isn't always the most fun way to play.
• Be patient with progression and enjoy the journey rather than rushing to the endgame.

description:
Pizza Ready, the ultimate pizza restaurant simulation game! 🍕🍽

Dive into an addictive restaurant game where cooking, management, and simulation come together in one delicious experience. 

If you love games about food, chefs, and running a busy kitchen, Pizza Ready is the perfect choice!

🍕 Run and Manage Your Own Pizza Restaurant! 🍕
Step into the role of a professional chef and pizza restaurant manager. Cook tasty dishes, follow recipes, design your menu, and serve customers efficiently.

From serving food to cleaning the kitchen, every part of restaurant management is in your hands. Manage your store wisely, upgrade your skills, and grow through exciting levels and events!

🚗 Two Sales Windows: Counter & Drive-Thru Serving! 🍽
Take orders from both the counter and Drive-Thru to serve more customers faster. Smart serving and smooth customer management are key to success. 

The more satisfied your customers, the faster your restaurant business grows!

💪 Hire Chefs, Manage Staff, and Build Friends at Work! 💼
Recruit talented chefs, hire helpful staff, and manage your team like a true HR expert. 

Upgrade employee skills, improve serving speed, and create a friendly workplace where friends work together to run the best restaurant in town.

🎨 Restaurant Design, Decor & Decoration! 🎨
Customize your restaurant with stylish decor, unique decoration, and smart design choices. 

A beautiful restaurant attracts more customers and boosts your food business to the next level.

🔥 Unlimited Expansion & Chain Restaurants Across States! 🔥
Expand your restaurant empire without limits. Open new locations, manage multiple restaurants, and become a nationwide food tycoon. 

Strategic management and smart simulation gameplay will help you dominate the restaurant industry.

😄 Endless Fun Cooking Game – Completely Free! 😄
Pizza Ready is a free-to-play cooking simulation game packed with fun events, progression levels, and satisfying restaurant gameplay. 

Whether you enjoy food games, restaurant management, or relaxing simulation games, Pizza Ready delivers nonstop fun.

Download Pizza Ready now and experience the joy of cooking, managing, and serving delicious food!

If you love restaurant games, cooking, management, and building a food empire, this game is made for you. 

Serve happy customers, master your menu, and become the ultimate pizza restaurant legend—one slice at a time! 🍕✨

description:
Have you ever dreamed of having a puppy? 🐶

Meet your new virtual friend in Dog Escape. 🐾 Rescue a cute pup, take care of them, and help them feel safe again, with cozy moments and satisfying escape gameplay.

Dog Escape is a virtual pet care adventure with escape gameplay. 🐶💖

Pet lovers and animal games fans, welcome to a world full of cute puppies you can rescue, collect, care for, and play with. Guide every pup through fun dog escape puzzle levels, then bring them home to a cozy shelter where the real bonding begins. If you’re into puppy games, dog games, and feel-good rescue stories, this one’s for you.

🐶 RESCUE & ESCAPE
- Help lost pups make it to safety through rooftop runs, tricky roads, and hidden maze paths.
- Outsmart traps in satisfying dog escape puzzle levels
- Guide your puppy through obstacles, timing challenges, and clever routes
- Rescue more pups to unlock more shelter progress

💖 CARE FOR YOUR PUPPIES
- This isn’t just “save and go.” Your puppies need love.
- Feed, heal, and care for rescued pups
- Watch your shelter fill up with adorable dog personalities
- Create a heartwarming second-chance story, one pup at a time

🎀 COLLECT, CUSTOMIZE & DRESS UP
- Tap into that cute collector feeling. More pups, more looks, more surprises.
- Unlock adorable skins and cute styles
- Collect shelter upgrades, items, and new zones
- Build your own cozy dog world that keeps growing

🧩 PUZZLES + PUPPY FUN (ANIMAL GAMES STYLE)
- Dog Escape blends quick, satisfying action with clever puzzle moments.
- Light, fun gameplay for fans of animal games and puppy games
- Mini challenges and variety so levels don’t feel the same
- Easy to pick up, fun to master, great for short play sessions

🎉 EVENTS & REWARDS
- Limited-time events bring fresh goals and collectible rewards.
- Earn rare items, badges, and cute unlocks
- Discover new content through regular updates

👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 FAMILY-FRIENDLY PLAY
Dog Escape is designed to be a cozy, feel-good experience for dog lovers and it's parents approved! It’s great for families and friends looking for light, cute dog games and puppy rescue games.

📲 Download Dog Escape today
Rescue, protect, and care for every puppy in Dog Escape, and build the shelter they deserve. 🏡🐾

🐾 Dog Escape: Puppy Rescue Shelter Story 🐶
Step into the heartwarming world of Dog Escape! In this fun yet lovely rescue story, your mission is to rescue every lost puppy, bring them to safety, and build a cozy dog shelter they can finally call home. This isn’t just a game, it’s a puppy rescue saga built for dog lovers everywhere!!

Get ready for a blend of dog run, dog chase, and dog games adventure with brainy puzzles and emotional moments that’ll tug at your heartstrings. Whether you're dodging obstacles or planning the perfect escape, this is dog escape at its best - fast, fun, and full of heart.

🐶 Build & Grow Your Dog Shelter
Every rescued dog finds a new home in your puppy shelter.
- Feed, heal, and take care of your rescued pups
- Play meta layers that feel like a cozy dog sim
- Expand your space with new zones, puppies, and items

Turn your rescue efforts into a full-blown dog town for pups of all sizes! This is dog shelter gameplay done right.

💖 Why Players Love Dog Escape
- Combines rescue missions with rich emotional payoffs
- Includes elements of dog games, puppy rescue games, and shelter care sims
- Great for kids, families, and anyone who dreams of helping a dog find a home

If you love playing games about puppy town, furry friends, puppies, or dogs, you’ll find everything you need right here and so much more!!

description:
"My Garden Tale is a casual simulation and social game where you can grow hundreds of flowers, enjoy the joy of cultivation, create elegant floral arrangements, and decorate your very own garden haven with themed designs.

Game Features:
〓Floral Wonderland〓
Step into the role of a professional gardener with your own plot of land. Hundreds of uniquely styled flowers await your care—from fiery red roses to fresh daisies and elegant tulips, each with its own growth cycle and needs.

〓Artful Flower Arranging〓
Once you’ve harvested vibrant blooms, unleash your creativity through the art of flower arranging. Choose vases, freely combine flowers, and create stunning pieces to showcase or sell for a fulfilling sense of achievement.

〓Lively Flower Fair〓
Want to profit from your garden? Take on daily custom floral orders, resident requests, silk deliveries, and team tasks. Complete them to earn gold and experience, and manage your operations well to avoid cancellations and boost sales!

〓A Blooming Encounter〓
Make friends and form guilds for fun social interactions. Visit friends’ gardens, “borrow” flowers in joyful flower-snatching battles, and compete in guild events to win rich rewards.

〓Cozy Pet Courtyard〓
In your private “Orange Meow Courtyard,” cuddle, feed, and play with your furry companion for a healing experience. Your pet can even explore and bring back resources. Customize their space with a wide variety of furniture—some of which grant attribute bonuses.

〓Glamorous Dress Up〓
Unlock a variety of exquisite outfits and accessories. Mix, match, and design personalized makeup to express your unique style."

description:
Welcome to Yoyo Town, where your relaxing new life begins!

Here, you can immerse yourself in a warm and adorable art style, experience a life of leisurely freedom, meet hospitable neighbors, and even own your dream home! With free interior design, personalized fashion, and adorable pets, a variety of relaxing gameplay options await you. Make every day full of surprises and joy!

【Abundant Layouts, Unlimited Decoration】
In Yoyo Town, everyone can own their own houses! Choose from a wide range of layouts: a cozy bungalow, a stylish loft, a spacious duplex, or a luxurious villa. You can freely plan the layout of your home, adjust space partitions, and meticulously decorate every detail—from the living room and bedroom to the balcony, kitchen, and bathroom—creating your ideal living space! You can also renovate and remodel your house anytime, keeping your home feeling fresh and new!

【Renovate Freely, Remodel Your Home】
With over a thousand types of furniture, you can easily create your dream home style! Whether you prefer the elegant charm of classic Chinese aesthetics, sleek and modern minimalist design, romantic fairy-tale themes, rustic country vibes, or industrial retro styles… you can mix and match freely, making each room uniquely charming! Besides, with a variety of interactive furniture, your home will be full of life, perfectly realizing your dream blueprint!

【Dress Freely, Create Your Style】
A highly customizable outfit system lets you create a unique virtual avatar! Choose from hundreds of clothing items, hairstyles, accessories, and makeup options. From refined elegance to trendy avant-garde, you can master any style. Whether it's casual daily wear, simple and efficient looks, gorgeous royal attire, or sweet dreamy styles, you can mix and match freely, always presenting the best version of yourself!

【Relaxing Gameplay, Super Stress-Relieving Mini-Games】
Yoyo Town is not just your home—it's a vibrant little town! Enjoy a variety of life-simulation activities: go fishing by the shore, learn to cook at the canteen, brew aromatic coffee at the café, or pick beautiful bouquets at the flower shop… You can also meet the town's residents and share bits of daily life with friends! Open the map to unlock more fun activities with one click, and enjoy a leisurely, comfortable ideal life!

【Pets Welcome, Enjoy Cozy Moments】
A cat or a dog? The answer is "both"! In Yoyo Town, you can adopt pets and spend warm, cozy moments together! Whether it's a clingy kitten or an energetic puppy, they'll leave their little paw prints all over your home, accompanying you every day. You can even dress up your pet in cute outfits and create a dedicated interactive space for them, enjoying the therapeutic joy of living with pets!

【Build Together, Grow Together】
Here, you can team up with like-minded friends to build your ideal town—from planting flowers to decorating courtyards, creating it step by step! Whether you're sharing decoration ideas, participating in town events, or building shared spaces with friends, you'll find a sense of belonging here and create wonderful memories together!

description:
Join Lamar’s Hilarious Rise in "Lamar - Idle Vlogger"!
Dive into the laugh-out-loud world of Lamar, a vlogger determined to turn life's challenges into viral opportunities. In this engaging idle clicker and life simulator, watch Lamar transform from zero to hero, making his way to the top as a rich tycoon in the influencer industry.
From Cheated to Champion
Lamar’s journey kicks off with a shocking revelation: he was cheated. But instead of giving up, he decides to start his vlogging career. His mission? To go from an unknown, struggling individual to a viral vlogger and rich tycoon, proving that with grit and creativity, anyone can achieve greatness.
Vlogger Go Viral
Create content that captures the hearts of millions. Experiment with hilarious pranks, engaging challenges, and viral trends to build a massive fanbase. Your goal is simple: make Lamar the most famous vlogger on the internet. As an idle streamer, even when you're not actively playing, Lamar's channel continues to grow, attracting more fans and generating more revenue.
Build Your Empire
As Lamar's popularity soars, so does his wealth. Use your earnings to invest in better equipment, stylish outfits, and a top-notch studio. Transform your humble beginnings into a luxurious lifestyle and become a true rich tycoon in the influencer world. Manage Lamar’s career wisely, balancing content creation, fan engagement, and personal life to ensure continuous growth.
Life Simulator and Beyond
"Lamar - Idle Vlogger" isn't just about making videos; it's a comprehensive life simulator that lets you experience the full spectrum of the tuber life. From planning content to dealing with haters, every decision you make impacts Lamar’s journey. Collaborate with other influencers, participate in trending challenges, and unlock exciting new opportunities as you climb the ladder of fame.
Interactive Gameplay
Enjoy an immersive idle clicker experience where your strategic choices determine Lamar's success. Engage in the dynamic world of content creation, and watch as Lamar evolves from a novice to a streaming sensation. With a bit of strategy and a lot of fun, guide Lamar through the challenges of being an influencer and streamer tycoon.
Key Features:
Vlogger Go Viral: Create and share hilarious and engaging content to build a massive fanbase.
Idle Clicker: Grow your channel and income even when you're offline.
Rich Tycoon: Invest in equipment and lifestyle upgrades to become a wealthy influencer.
Life Simulator: Experience the highs and lows of vlogging life with realistic challenges and decisions.
Zero to Hero: Witness Lamar’s journey from an unknown vlogger to an internet sensation.
Rich Inc: Build your brand and expand your empire in the influencer industry.
Tuber Life: Dive into the world of online content creation and enjoy the thrill of becoming a star.
Streamer Tycoon: Manage Lamar’s career and rise to the top of the streaming world.
Idle Streamer: Enjoy the idle gameplay where your progress continues even when you're away.
Join Lamar on his quest to turn betrayal into triumph. Download "Lamar - Idle Vlogger" now and start your adventure in the exciting world of vlogging and streaming. With your help, Lamar can transform from a cheated nobody into a rich, influential superstar. Let the journey begin!

To opt out of CrazyLabs sales of personal information as a California resident, please visit the settings page within this app. For more information visit our privacy policy: https://crazylabs.com/app

description:
Welcome to the heart of the Midwest, where vast fields, charming farmsteads, and a deep mystery await! This farming simulator expands the Big Farm franchise with Big Farm: Homestead! 

In Big Farm: Homestead, you face the challenge of restoring the three Townsend family farms; each with its own unique crops, animals, and history. This engaging farming sim is more than just a farming game, it's a story of discovery: once-thriving White Oak Lake, the village's water source, is draining, and pollution is spreading. Someone is behind this disaster, and it's up to you to uncover the truth in this rich farm story!

BUILD & EXPAND YOUR BIG FARM

Your journey in this relaxing simulation game is all about growth. Grow a variety of crops, from golden wheat and juicy corn to specialty Midwestern produce. Harvest plentiful resources daily to sustain your big farm.  Raise adorable animals including cows, horses, chickens, and even rare breeds!

Upgrade your barns, silos, and farmhouses to create a thriving agricultural empire. Every piece of equipment plays a part in the prosperity of your farm city as you build your ultimate homestead. It’s the perfect blend of a gentle farming simulator and an exciting farm tycoon experience.

EXPERIENCE TRUE FARMING LIFE IN YOUR VILLAGE

Immerse yourself in the rhythm of village life. Harvest fresh produce, craft delicious goods, and fulfill orders to help local townsfolk. 

Join the community of dedicated farmers who make this farming region so special. This is one of the best farm games for free that lets you live out your dream of successful farming.

SAVE THE LAKE & UNCOVER THE MYSTERY

The lifeblood of these farms - the beautiful White Oak Lake - is vanishing. Who is behind it? Follow a captivating story, interact with interesting characters, and solve the game's mystery before it’s too late!

MAKE THE FARM BEAUTIFUL

Decorate your farm with charming fences, orchards, flowerbeds, embodying the American farming spirit in your own homestead. 

MEET FARMING CHARACTERS

Form friendships, unlock new storylines, and work with other farmers in the village to rebuild the Townsend legacy. Your family and friends are integral to your journey in this warm-hearted farm story.

COMPLETE QUESTS & EXPLORE NEW ADVENTURES

Take on exciting farm challenges, seasonal events, and hidden treasures as you expand your farming skills! Embark on an adventure that transforms your small plot into a bustling, dream big farm.
The future of the Townsend's farms and the lake rests in your hands. Can you restore the farms, save the water, and uncover the secret behind the destruction?

Start your American farming simulator adventure today in Big Farm: Homestead, the game that turns farming into a thrilling harvest adventure! 
Experience the joy of harvest land and build your dream farm village simulator in one of the top free farming games available. This farm story is your chance to build a legacy, not just a ranch!

- Welcome, Chef!
Your assistant Lea is waiting for you to start the adventure of opening restaurants and serving customers around the world. Merge Cooking not only allows you to cook as a star chef and master the world cuisine but also helps you realize your designer dream and renovate Michelin star restaurants!

- Start a food tour!
ENJOY Eggs Benedict in New York, DRINK Tom Yam Gong in Bangkok, ROLL Sushi in Tokyo, DINE on Escargot in Paris… Merge Cooking takes you on a world tour, city by city! You will unlock a world-famous dish every day and discover more exciting and challenging recipes to hone your cooking skills.
Various local cuisines – Taco, Kebab, Ramen and more.
Numerous restaurant themes – fast food, BBQ, seafood and more. 

- Play with ingredients!
MERGE ingredients with the simple steps – tap, drag & merge! Quality delicacy requires nothing but basic ingredients! 
COOK with the help of machines – seven pieces of equipment that bring you extra fun! Simulate real-life cooking and prepare the food in a fun way! Frying pan, juice blender, oven and cocktail shaker… everything you need to prepare a decent meal will be on standby. Say goodbye to overcooked pies and charred steaks!

- Eat outside the box!
Mozzarella, pecan, coconut, lobster, champagne… Find everything you need to become a world-famous chef. Merge them to serve hungry customers! Discover more as you play! Unlock special souvenirs as you travel. How about sending a postcard from Hollywood?

- Every flavor tells a story!
Nothing makes people more connected than good food. Get familiar with the American restaurant owner who's also a football coach and the French restaurant manager who's elegant but picky. Greet customers from all walks of life. Learn their stories and write more of your own!

In Merge Cooking you’ll:
√ MERGE fruits, vegetables, cheese and UNCOVER other numerous ingredients.
√ COOK exotic and fantastic dishes and TRAVEL to different countries.
√ SIMULATE real-life cooking with different cooking equipment.
√ RENOVATE restaurants with fresh new designs.
√ UPGRADE culinary skills and MASTER global recipes.
√ RELAX by enjoying great delicacy. No time pressure!
√ CLAIM amazing rewards and gifts.
√ ENGAGE yourself and ENJOY extra fun!

Merge Cooking, cook anything!

description:
🐵 I Am Monkey is an adaptation of the popular VR experience set inside the cage of a zoo monkey. Visitors arrive with different personalities: some are gentle and generous, others are noisy, mocking, or aggressive. Each encounter changes the atmosphere of the cage, creating moments of comedy, chaos, and tension.

🙉  Zoo space becomes an interactive playground. Bananas, cameras, and random objects can be grabbed, eaten, or thrown. The bars, the floor, and every gift from visitors are fully interactive, making each session unique and alive.

🐒  With fully interactive objects, unpredictable visitor behavior, and a mix of humor and tension, I Am Monkey offers a sandbox experience that blends playful fun with thought-provoking encounters.

Gameplay features:
Be the Monkey – fully immersive VR perspective of a zoo animal.
Multiple play styles – charm, ignore, resist
Various visitors – humans who can be cute, friendly, or aggressive.
Sandbox interactivity – throw bananas, grab visitors’ objects or the visitors, manipulate your environment.

🐒 Play as a Monkey
In I Am Monkey you live behind bars, but your world is full of choices. Visitors come and go — some gentle, some cruel — each one shaping the story of the little Monkey.

description:
Unleash the power of the cosmos and embark on an epic journey of creative destruction with Solar Smash, the ultimate physics-based sandbox simulation game!

🌌 Simulate the Universe: Harness the forces of nature and become a cosmic architect as you explore the boundless expanse of space. Craft and customize your own planetary systems, from the tiniest asteroids to massive gas giants.

🪐 Two Thrilling Game Modes:

Planet Smash: Annihilate planets and moons with over 50 different weapons! Choose from lasers, meteors, nukes, antimatter missiles, UFOs, battleships, space fighters, railguns, black holes, space shibas, orbital ion cannons, supernovas, laser swords, giant monsters, celestial beings, and even defensive weapons like shields and defensive satellites. Destroy everything in your path in both familiar solar systems and exotic star systems with artificial megastructures like ring worlds and giant moons with planetary force fields.

Solar System Smash: Dive deep into physics simulations and unleash your creativity in a mode that allows you to play with one of three star systems, including our very own Solar system. Or create your own star systems, complete with planets and set their orbits. Experiment with planetary collisions, create black holes to disrupt orbits, and engage in endless cosmic simulations.

🌠 Realistic Physics: Experience the breathtaking beauty of scientifically accurate gravitational interactions and celestial mechanics. Witness the awe-inspiring consequences of your every action as you set celestial bodies on collision courses, triggering cataclysmic events that defy imagination.

☄️ Unleash Your Creativity: It's your universe to shape and reshape! Build, experiment, and destroy to your heart's content. The power to craft worlds or obliterate them is in your hands. What will you create, and what will you obliterate in your quest for cosmic dominance?

🌟 Destruction Like Never Before: Tear apart planets, cause supernovas, and create black holes that consume everything in their path. Embrace the chaos and experience the visceral satisfaction of witnessing your cosmic masterpieces crumble to dust.

🎮 Intuitive Controls: Dive into the cosmos with easy-to-use controls designed for both beginners and experienced players. Explore the infinite reaches of the universe and let your imagination run wild.

Solar Smash is the ultimate sandbox for those who crave both the creative and the destructive. Are you ready to make your mark on the cosmos? Download Solar Smash now!

Warning
This game contains flashing lights that may make it unsuitable for people with photosensitive epilepsy or other photosensitive conditions. Player discretion is advised.

Space images credits:
NASA's Scientific Visualization Studio
NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center
Space Telescope Science Institute

description:
😎 WELCOME TO FLOP HOUSE
 Think you can run a homeless shelter without losing your cool? In Flop House, you’re the idle manager of the most chaotic “home away from home” you’ll ever build. Take in folks, hand out meals, and prove you’ve got what it takes to turn a flop into a full-on success story.

🏠 BUILD YOUR SHELTER, YOUR WAY
 Start small with a beat-up homeless shelter that barely has a bed and a bathroom. Upgrade it step by step—add kitchens, showers, and all the essentials. The better your shelter gets, the more people show up to crash at your Flop House.

💰 FROM NOTHING TO TYCOON STATUS
 This isn’t just about good vibes—it’s about smart moves. Manage resources, hire staff, and unlock upgrades like a pro. With every level-up, you’re not just giving people a place to sleep—you’re building your own legend as an idle tycoon.

👥 TEAMWORK MAKES THE DREAM WORK
 Cooking, cleaning, caring—it’s a lot for one guy. Luckily, you can build a team to keep your shelter running. Just don’t slack off too hard—your Flop House doesn’t manage itself!

🕹️ LOVE SIMULATIONS?
If you’re into simulation games, Flop House fits right in. It mixes the fun of animal shelter games, the strategy of idle tycoon games, and the chill grind of a classic simulation game—all with its own chaotic twist. Whether you call it a shelter simulator or an idle manager, this game delivers the laughs, the upgrades, and the endless grind you’re looking for.

🎮 WHY FLOP HOUSE RULES
- Addictive shelter games mechanics with a casual idle life vibe
- Play as an idle manager running a real homeless shelter
- Build, upgrade, and expand like it’s your personal idle hotel
- Experience shelter management with a mix of humor and heart

So, ready to dive into homeless life (the game kind, not the real deal) and prove you’re the boss of the ultimate homeless shelter? Download now and start managing!

Our game is super satisfying and relaxing, making it the perfect way to release your stress with the dough of clay. Whether you're a professional artist or a DIY enthusiast, our game offers simple mechanics and tools that make sculpting, reface and restyle easy and fun. With our amazing 3D graphics, you can bring your clay craft models to life and create a truly immersive experience.

description:
🌲 Lumber Inc: Build Your Sawmill Empire! 🌲
Welcome to your very own forest sawmill! In Lumber Inc, you take control of a growing wood workshop—from chopping trees and processing timber to selling products for profit. Step by step, build an efficient automated production line and establish yourself as the ultimate lumber tycoon!

🪵 Immerse yourself in a relaxing and satisfying wood-processing world where a variety of tasks await your decisions: hiring workers, optimizing workflows, fulfilling orders, and joining limited-time events... Every day is filled with vitality and opportunity!

🌟 Key Features:

👷 Build Your Team: Hire workers with different skills—hardworking lumberjacks, skilled saw operators, and savvy sales managers—assign their roles, and run your timber empire efficiently!

🔄 Set Up Smart Production Lines: Upgrade from basic saws to fully automated drying, sorting, and polishing machines. Streamline the process from log to high-quality plank and maximize your profits!

📦 Complete Orders & Challenges: Handle diverse customer orders, manage resources and shipments wisely, and solve unexpected production issues to keep your lumber factory running smoothly!

🌳 Join Forest Competitions: Participate in weekly contests and limited-time events against other players. Test your sawmill efficiency and management strategy to win rare rewards and glorious titles!

🎯 Build Your Own Lumber Empire: Start from a small workshop and expand into an industry giant. Can you seize the opportunity to build the most profitable and modern lumber business?

🪓 Easy controls, fun management, and new goals to achieve every day! Enter Lumber Inc now and begin your journey to become a wood magnate!

⏬Download the game today and enjoy a busy yet fulfilling lumber entrepreneurship adventure!

description:
📖 Freaky Stan - Interactive Comic Story Game

Freaky Stan is an interactive story game told as a funny comic. Make choices, follow episodes, and shape the story through your decisions. This interactive comic story combines humor, romance, and light puzzles into an engaging experience.

Each episode is part of a larger story game where your choices affect how the story unfolds.

🎭 Make Choices in a Funny Story

In this story choices game, you decide how Freaky Stan acts in awkward and hilarious situations. Every decision changes the dialogue, reactions, and direction of the interactive story.

- Make choices that shape the story

- Play through funny comic episodes

- Enjoy light puzzles inside the story

- Follow a dating and romance storyline

This is a choice game where the focus is on story, humor, and interaction rather than complex mechanics.

💬 Episode-Based Interactive Story

Freaky Stan is an episode game with short, engaging chapters. Each episode tells a unique part of the story and offers new choices to make.

If you enjoy episode story games, interactive stories, or comic-style storytelling, this game is made for you.

❤️ Dating and Romance Story Game

The story follows a boy trying to win the heart of his celebrity crush. This dating story game mixes romance, funny moments, and meaningful choices.

Your decisions influence how characters react and how the romance story develops across episodes.

🎮 Easy to Play, Fun to Follow

This interactive story game is easy to play and perfect for short sessions. Read the comic, make choices, solve light puzzles, and enjoy the story anywhere - even offline.

Freaky Stan is ideal for fans of:

- interactive story games

- story choices and episode games

- comic story games

- dating and romance stories

Download Freaky Stan and enjoy a fun interactive comic story where your choices matter.

description:
Do you love playing with slime and taking care of cute virtual pets? Now you can enjoy both loves in a single game! Meet Bruno - the Super Slime Pet, your new cute, adorable friend!

Dramaton, the creator of the famous DIY, ASMR 3D coloring games Super Slime Simulator™, Squishy Magic™, and Go! Dolliz™, is proud to introduce a first of its kind virtual pet simulation game which combines the fun, relaxing creativity of Super Slime Simulator™ with the joy of virtual pet games.  If you like slime DIY and ASMR, making 3D virtual toys, playing simulation games and taking care of virtual pets, you are going to love this new slime pet simulation game! 

🐾🐾 Meet Bruno the Slime Pet: The Ultimate ASMR Virtual Companion! 

Embark on a journey into the world of virtual pet care with Bruno! Bruno is no ordinary pet; he's a lovable blob of animated slime, and he's here to offer you endless fun, relaxation, and anti-stress enjoyment. With a personality as wacky as his colorful appearance, Bruno is the perfect companion for you if you are looking for a delightful, stress-free experience.
Bruno's will keep you entertained while offering you a unique form of ASMR relaxation. Watch him bounce, wiggle, and react to your every touch. He's here to ensure you're never short of laughter and enjoyment. 

Relieve your stress and discover the relaxing, satisfying ASMR experience of playing with your slime pet: stretch your pet, squish it, knead it, pop it and enjoy your pet’s funny adorable reactions and voices. So satisfying! 

🐱🐶 Take Care of your Slime Pet 🐱🐶

Your Super Slime Pet needs lots of love and attention to help it grow up and shine! Take care of your pet friend, play with it, and love it to make it the happiest, most beautiful slime pet in the world! make sure your slimy cute pet is always happy and smiling, but never hungry, sleepy, dirty or bored. 

Bruno loves to eat! Feed your hungry slime buddy with tons of delicious snacks and yummies you can buy in the app’s food store: cakes, candy, fruits, pizza, burgers, ice-cream and many more, each resulting in its own humorous reactions. 

Give your pet a slimy bubble bath to keep it shiny and clean and watch as his responses fill your day with laughter. Bruno's bedtime is equally charming, promising you a relaxing and anti-stress experience. Put your pet to sleep when it is tired and wake it up in the morning for a new fun day of slime adventures!

🌈 Customize your Slime Pet 🌈

Unleash your creativity and customize your slime friend and give it new cool and cute looks by choosing  from a range of slime types, each with its own unique texture and squishiness. Experiment with vibrant colors and add charming slime decorations to create your ideal slime pet, just like in a slime DIY game! Each slime boasts a unique texture, sound and behavior, producing a unique ASMR satisfying sensation.

But that's not all – Bruno's wardrobe is filled with fun accessories like funny hats, mustaches, glasses, and more! Dress him up, and watch your beloved pet come to life in the quirkiest, cutest outfits imaginable.

🎉Advance Through the Levels 🎉 

By playing with and taking care of Bruno, you'll progress through various game levels. Complete challenges, earn rewards, and unlock exciting new features as you advance. The more you play with your slime pet, cuddle it, pamper it and take care for it, the more coins you earn to unlock new features and items that you can use to treat your pet and give it funny, adorable new looks: new slime types, colors, awesome decorations, and tasty food to feed your pet with. 


Download Bruno - My Super Slime Pet now and discover a world of fun, relaxation and creative adventures with your virtual pet friend. Bruno is waiting to become a part of your day, offering you the delightful experience of caring for and customizing your very own virtual pet. Discover the magic of Bruno today, and experience the cutest, funniest, and most relaxing virtual pet game ever!

description:
Welcome to Heartopia, a multiplayer life simulation game crafted for creativity, freedom, and peace. Build your dream home, explore a wide range of hobbies, and forge warm connections with friends in a town full of endless possibilities. 

[Game Features]
◆ Let's Connect! Create Unique Memories
Chat with the charming residents of Heartopia Town, hang out with old friends, and meet new friends every time you log in!

◆ Let's Explore! Gardening, Fishing, Birding...
Hobbies are yours to enjoy, not chores. In Heartopia, feel free to develop six major hobbies, including fishing, cooking, gardening, birdwatching, and more.

◆ Let's Build! Design Your Dream House
Whether you dream of a cozy cottage or a magnificent mansion, Heartopia gives you the tools to turn your vision into a reality. You can also invite your friends over and build your dream home together. 

◆ Let's Dress Up! 1000+ Daily Outfits
Mix and match casual wear, elegant gowns, and whimsical costumes to create the perfect look for any occasion. Express your mood and show the world who you are.

◆ Let's Pet! Adopt Cats and Dogs
Meet your very own animal companions in Heartopia! While each of your furry friends may come with different colors and personalities, they can all bring you warmth and comfort.

[Follow Us]

description:
🛞 SLOWLY BUT SURELY 

Looking for a game with gallons of nitro and adrenaline, tricked out sports cars, crazy crashes, and foot-to-the-floor action? Well, you’d better keep looking, because Vehicle Masters is something a little different – a more relaxing simulator game that offers careful drivers the refined pleasures and simple satisfaction of accurately moving heavy vehicles through tight spaces while avoiding scrapes and collisions.

 Test your advanced driving skills in an enormous range of different trucks, buses and even excavators in this soothing, enjoyable and surprisingly realistic truck simulator. 

⚠️ REAL DRIVING 

• Realistic steering, acceleration and braking carefully calibrated for all vehicle types.
• Adapt your driving technique to different road conditions and situations.

🅿️ YOU CAN’T PARK THERE!

• Gently does it! Follow the steering pointers to guide your vehicle into the green space.
• Missed the mark? Don’t panic, you can always reverse out slowly and try again.
• Feel the satisfaction as you finally get your unwieldy vehicle perfectly parked.

🚚 🚒 🚓 VEHICLE VARIATION

• Over 20 different cars, trucks and other vehicles to drive in the game.
• Get behind the wheel in pickups, articulated trucks, fire trucks, police cars and even excavators.
• More than 80 items to decorate and customize the interior of your vehicle.

🌎 TRUCKING ALL OVER THE WORLD

• 7 regions in the game with different climate and road conditions.
• 20 unique areas to navigate, from crowded parking lots to twisting mountains roads.
• Keep on trucking and enjoy the gorgeous views as you drive.

🔧 MORE THAN JUST A DRIVER 

• Get out from behind the wheel and perform a variety of other simulator tasks in over 35 different missions.
• Jump in the fire truck, rush to the scene of the conflagration, and douse the flames.
• Operate all kinds of heavy machinery including diggers and excavators.

🛣 THE LONG AND WINDING ROAD

If you’re looking for a new driving game with a difference, a game that brings the world of hyper-realistic vehicle simulators to your mobile device, and a game that’s challenging, fun and surprisingly relaxing to play, then Vehicle Masters could be just what you’ve been searching for. Hone your skills behind the wheel and live out your trucking dreams in a huge array of different vehicles and driving situations. 

Download the game now, climb up into the cab and get ready for the long-haul in this entertaining and original driving simulator.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

description:
In a gaming universe dominated by titles, "Idle Zombie Mining Tycoon" stands out as a unique addition to the tycoon simulation genre. It offers players a fresh and immersive experience unlike any other idle miner game. With its innovative approach to combining tycoon and simulation elements, "Idle Zombie Mining Tycoon" takes players on an epic journey through realms of adventure and discovery. Every tap on the screen leads to new fortunes and exciting challenges. 

Features: 

🌍 Discover uncharted territories, expanding your domain in this unique blend of mine and adventure games. Whether it's trying to find diamonds or unearthing glistening gold, the thrill never ends. 

⛏ Not just another tap game. As the ultimate hero, dictate the pace of your zombie miners. Combine clicker strategies and managerial prowess, dig deep in exciting digging simulation games. 

🏆 hero are waiting for the challenges. Whether it's idle construction 3d tasks or battling competitors in miner games, the adventure never stops. 

🏰 Every simulation game needs their castle. Design an opulent mansion to reflect the success of your mining empire. Dive into economy game mechanisms and enjoy the experience of building and showcasing your achievements. 

💰 Offline game mechanics ensure you're always in the money. Your empire earns even when you're away, truly the epitome of idle money. 

🧟‍♂️ Dive into the realm of idle zombie games. Lead your zombie crew, optimize digs, and watch as your coffers overflow in this immersive tycoon simulator. 

Gold mines, bustling zombies, and endless riches beckon. From clicking game to intense simulation games, "Idle Zombie Mining Tycoon" offers a smorgasbord of features. With the spirit of an adventure capitalist, the strategy of a seasoned manager, and the thrill of finding treasure, this game has it all. 

Whether you're a fan of building simulation games, on the hunt to find diamonds, or seeking to build a mining empire. Join the ranks of elite miners, tap into your potential, and ascend the tycoon throne!

description:
Welcome to "Bid Master," a tycoon simulator that seamlessly blends price guessing and auction simulation. In this store games simulator, you'll immerse yourself in intense bidding wars against your rivals, earning vast wealth from high-stakes antique storage auctions. Are you ready to get rich and build your own business empire?

Become a legend in the auction world! As a seasoned auctioneer, your goal is to bid on and collect rare items, open a pawn shop, and establish and grow your business. Test your business acumen in this business tycoon simulator and create your own business empire!

📦 Test your auctioning strategy!
-- Collect rare treasures from around the world: antiques, sports cars, motorcycles, ships, famous paintings, second-hand cars, and even alien artifacts! Auction these items and become the richest tycoon in town!

-- Boss level challenges: Bid on ancient crowns, noble armor, mysterious statues, golden cups, and other valuable treasures. Become the king of warehouse treasure hunting and make a name for yourself in the world of negotiation!

💪 Manage your business empire
Use your business savvy to gradually expand your auction kingdom! Grow your business and become a business tycoon! Make more money!

-- Rent out buildings, open museums, sell cars, run gas stations, fish at fisheries... You can gradually build your own business empire!

🌍 Diversified business strategies
-- Simulate deep-sea fishing to catch various rare fish, which you can sell or place in your Fish aquarium! Become a fish tycoon
-- Run your own restaurant! Play some cooking games, cook delicious meals to satisfy your customers, and earn more money!
-- Build your five-star hotel. Collect rent and make a fortune. And create your business empire!
-- Manage a car factory, sell motorcycles, cars, and truck.
Simulate truck operations. Become a factory tycoon and make tons of money!

🏆 Guild Wars
-- Join a guild and participate in auction competitions with players from around the globe! Win rich rewards in guild wars!

Don’t hesitate, start auctioning now! Prepare your bidding strategy and embark on your auction journey! In this ultimate auction management simulator, auction items, manage your business empire, and become a wealthy tycoon!

description:
Idle business simulator and tycoon game with a post-apocalyptic and zombie survival theme. The world has ended, and you're running a post-apocalyptic trading post!

Your management skills will make the difference between survival and extinction. Build your outpost, trade with survivors, and expand your empire in this thrilling mega-simple 2D game with a gritty, immersive atmosphere.

When the night comes, fight off silly zombies!

Start with a small scrapyard outpost and grow your trading empire!

Begin with just a basic outpost in the desert, then upgrade and expand as you earn resources and profits. As you progress, discover new locations, from abandoned gas stations to underground vaults, and build the most prosperous post-apocalyptic trading network in the world!

There will be a ton of post-apocalyptic locations.
Venture from arid deserts to lush forests, encountering bandit camps, winter hideouts, and high-tech trading hubs. With each new level, unlock stunning new locations and challenges for your trading post.

Idle Outpost is perfect for players who love:

💥 Post-apocalyptic and survival-themed games
💼 Business simulation and tycoon games
🏗️ Building and managing virtual empires
🎮 Engaging single-player experiences

description:
Trophy Hunter – Your Ultimate Destination for Competitive Hunting Games!

Step into the wild with Trophy Hunter, a premier free-to-play shooting experience designed for enthusiasts of hunting games, shooting games, sniper games, and engaging casual games. Prepare for intense 1v1 PvP sniper hunting battle duels that test your hunter skills and strategy. Are you ready to become the ultimate trophy hunter in this top free shooting game?

Heart-Pounding PvP Hunting Duels Battle Challenge players in thrilling head-to-head sniper hunting battle matchups. Each duel battle pushes your sniper skills to the limit. As you progress through stunningly realistic locations, the challenge intensifies – face faster animals, shoot across greater distances, and track smaller targets. Precision shooting and quick hunter reflexes are your keys to victory in these hunting games battle. Become the top sniper hunter!

Explore Realistic Worlds & Hunt Diverse Wildlife Explore 9 breathtaking, realistic hunting locations across the globe! Immerse yourself in diverse environments like the vibrant Autumn Forest Yukon, rugged Montana, wild Kamchatka, sun-drenched Savanna, exotic Botswana, ancient Egypt, mysterious Deep Jungle, the enigmatic Birma’s Lost City, and the lush island of Java. Track and hunt variety of animals native to these zones including majestic deer, swift ostriches, massive hippos, cunning alligators, and agile macaques. Our top visuals bring these hunting grounds to life for every hunter. This is a premier free hunting experience battle.

Master Your Arsenal: Weapons & Ammo

Weapons: Collect cards from duel Crates or leaderboard rewards to unlock and upgrade over 20 distinct firearms perfect for any sniper hunter battle. Each weapon features unique stats like Damage, Bullet Speed, Score Bonus, Zoom level, Slow Motion duration, and Zoom Time. Customize your shooting loadout to match your hunting style and dominate the battle games. Fine-tune your sniper gear!

Ammo: Strategy extends to your bullets! Choose from 4 types, each with specific stats like Damage Bonus, Score Bonus, Number of Shots (3 per duel), and Bullet Speed. Equip the fiery Fire Bullet (+20% Damage) or the tactical Violet Crown Bullet (+1% Score Bonus). Make every sniper shot count in these dynamic sniper battle games. Enhance your shooting power!

Daily Precision Challenge: Golden Shot Test your sniper precision daily with the Golden Shot feature! Get one FREE hunt each day using a special sniper bullet. The better your shooting accuracy, the bigger the reward! Hone your sniper aim for top prizes and prove your mastery in these skill-based free hunting games battle. It’s a free chance for every hunter!

Show Off Your Success: The Hunter Lodge Display your greatest achievements in your personal Hunter Lodge! This popular feature lets you showcase the trophy animals you've successfully hunted, boosting your hunter profile and providing a visual record of your hunting prowess as a top trophy hunter. Every successful hunter needs a Lodge!

Climb the Ranks: Clubs & Leaderboards Compete fiercely to rise through the global leaderboards. Your winnings from hunting duels battle determine your rank. Earn rewards at the end of each season and prove you are the top trophy hunter. Join or create Hunting Clubs to team up with fellow hunter players, share sniper strategies, and compete together in these casual games battle. Show your shooting skill!

Trophy Hunter offers more depth than typical free casual games. It blends the thrill of shooting games and the precision of sniper games with strategic hunting gameplay. Whether you're a veteran hunter or new to free hunting games, Trophy Hunter provides a rich free shooting experience for every sniper hunter. Master the sniper role!

Ready your rifle, steady your sniper aim, and prepare to claim your title. Download Trophy Hunter now – it’s free! Become a legendary hunter in the world of shooting games! Try the best free sniper action today!

You can play in multiplayer or PvP mode in different pool tables. Become the best player and challenge your friends in this pool game.

You can play pool in multiplayer or PvP mode using different balls and table types. 8 Ball Pool is designed to help your intelligence. You will improve the aim when shooting balls with the cue.

description:

Control your powerful bike 💨, perform crazy bike stunts, and race through diverse environments that push your balance and skill to the edge.

🧠Skill-based gameplay for all motorcycle stunt fans.
🎥Dynamic camera angles and immersive sounds.

Ride, balance, and perform like a pro bike rider, every stunt counts in the moto bike stunt wheelie game!

description:
Head Ball 2 is a thrilling and fast-paced multiplayer football game where you can  challenge your opponents!. Take place in 1v1  online  football matches against real opponents  from all around the world. 

Join millions of football players to prove yourself to the online football community and your friends. 

Play 90-seconds of action-packed football matches; whoever scores more goals, wins!

 Challenge your friends in real-time! 
Get social by connecting your Facebook account and playing exciting football matches with your friends, show them who is the best! You can also join a football team or create your own team and gain different rewards as you win matches! Represent your team and face-off, different teams, to show which football team is superior. Contribute to your teams’ overall progress. 

 Rumble Through Competitive Soccer Leagues with your team! 
Compete in 5 different football leagues and do your best to make it to the very top of the ladder. Join a team or create your own, either way, you’re much powerful with your team! Join the competition each week where you have a chance to challenge other teams all around the world. The more teams you beat, the more chances to rise from Bronze League to Diamond League! Fight your way through real opponents and challenging soccer matches. You can’t know who the winner before the match will be is over.

Unique Gameplay
Football is all about kicking the ball and scoring goals, right? 

Kick, strike and score using your hero. Use your feet, head, and superpowers to score goals. Head Ball 2 offers simplistic gameplay that can be quickly transformed into action-packed and exciting games.  Hit the ball, hit your opponent, use headers, superpowers or outwit your opponent by juking them. Everything is permitted, as long as you win!

 Take Control of Your Soccer Career  
Progress through the unique career mode to unlock special bonuses, characters, and accessories. As you progress, rewards become increasingly challenging to obtain, do you have what it takes?

Stand out from the crowd! 
Pick the best character out of 125 unique upgradeable characters, unlock new accessories to improve your football hero, and create your dream football player!  As you progress, you will unlock different stadiums and gain fans to support you. The more the merrier! 
Become the ultimate soccer hero and show who’s got more style and skill!

Upgrade Your Character
Upgrade your character to unlock your full potential. Progress through the career mode to unlock unique bonuses, accessories, and even heroes. As you progress, the rewards will get better but so will the challenge. Are you up to it?

No match will be the same as the previous one in this football game! 

Features

-Play football against real opponents from all across the world in real-time!
- Thrilling moments with the voice of the legendary commentator, John Motson!
-Facebook connection to play with your friends!
-Dynamic and exciting gameplay with dashy graphics.
-125 unique characters to unlock.
-5 unique competitive soccer leagues with 15 brackets to play through. 
-Hundreds of accessories to improve your football hero!
-Plan out your strategy on the field with 18 upgradable powers.
-Card packs that contain characters and items.  
-Gain supporters to unlock new stadiums.
-Daily Missions to get more fun and rewards!

Download Head Ball 2 to experience the thrill of challenging soccer matches against millions of players across the world! 

Important! 
Head Ball 2 is a free-to-play game. However, there are some in-game items that can be purchased for real money. You can disable in-app purchases in your device’s settings if you don’t want this feature.

A network connection is required to play. This game includes optional in-game purchases (includes random items).

description:
Get ready for an epic journey of muscle and strategy in "Boss Fight" - the game where you start small but dream big! You're the underdog warrior, facing off against foes who've never heard of skipping leg day. But fear not! Every battle, win or lose, bulks up your "power" and "defense", visualized as your character's burgeoning muscles and towering stature.
Dive into levels where you embody fighters from across the globe - from a nimble boxer to a capoeira master, an MMA fighter to a streetwise brawler. Each defeat is just a step closer to becoming the ultimate boss yourself. With each upgrade, watch your character grow from a lightweight contender to a heavyweight champion.
But it's not all about brute strength; strategy is key. Choose your upgrades wisely to balance power and defense, ensuring your victory in the next round.

description:
■ "eFootball™" - An Evolution from "PES"
It's an all-new era of digital soccer: "PES" has now evolved into "eFootball™"! And now you can experience the next generation of soccer gaming with "eFootball™"!

■ Welcoming Newcomers
After downloading, you can learn the basic controls of the game via a step-by-step tutorial that includes practical demonstrations! Complete them all, and receive Lionel Messi!

We have also added the Smart Assist setting to help users enjoy the fun and excitement of playing matches.
Without entering complex commands, get past the opposing defense with a brilliant dribble or pass, then score a goal with a powerful shot.

[Ways of Playing]
■Start Off With Your Favorite Team
Whether it's a club or national side from Europe, the Americas, Asia, or elsewhere around the world, begin a new game with the team you support!

■ Sign Players
After creating your team, it's time to get some signings in! From current superstars to soccer legends, sign players and take your team to new heights!

■ Playing Matches
Once you have built a team with your favorite players, it's time to take them to the field.
From testing your skills against the AI, to competing for ranking in Online Matches, enjoy eFootball™ the way you like!

■ Player Development
Depending on Player Types, signed players can be further developed.
Level up players by putting them in matches or using in-game items, then spend the Progression Points acquired to increase Player Stats.

In case you prefer to customize a player to fit your personal preferences, you have the option to allocate the Progression Points manually.
When in doubt about how to develop the player, you can use the [Recommended] function to automatically allocate his Points.
Develop your players to your exact liking!

[For More Fun]
■ Weekly Live Updates
The Live Update is the feature that reflects player transfers and match achievements from soccer in real life.
Take note of the Live Updates released each week, adjust your squad, and make your mark out on the field.

■ Customize a Stadium
Choose your favorite Stadium Elements, such as Tifos and Giant Props, and watch them appear at your stadium during the matches you play.
Add color to the game by arranging your stadium however you like!

*Users that reside in Belgium will not have access to loot boxes that require eFootball™ Coins as payment.

[For the Latest News]
New features, modes, events, and gameplay improvements will be continuously implemented.
For more information, see the official eFootball™ website.

[Downloading the Game]
Approximately 2.8 GB of free storage space is required to download and install eFootball™.
Please make sure you have enough free space before beginning the download.
We also recommend that you use a Wi-Fi connection to download the base game and any of its updates.

[Online Connectivity]
An internet connection is required to play eFootball™. We also strongly recommend playing with a stable connection to ensure you get the most out of the game.

Golf Rival is a free-to-play multiplayer online PvP golf game where great golf skills meet infinite golf creativity. Show off your golfing abilities like never before! Collect powerful golf clubs and balls and tee off across over 300+ courses in more than 20+ themes! Satisfy your golf dreams of hitting incredible shots, climbing the leaderboards and proving you’re a golf game master. Let’s go for a perfect swing and hit that hole-in-one, golfers!

This exciting online free golf game has many modes to play and master. From 1v1 PvP golf, to Tournament mode where it’s you against the community of golfers around the world, to playing golf with friends - in Golf Rival, scoring a birdie is only the start of the competitive fun! Use powerful balls and clubs to outwit your opponent, as no two fun multiplayer golf battles are the same. 

Grab your golf clubs, because Golf Rival has it all, whether you’re a golfing games newbie or an ultimate sports game expert!

PLAY EXCITING GOLF GAMES
-Complete stages and unlock incredible new golf challenges to conquer by winning real-time golf battles
-Master your golf swing with precision and creativity to watch your skills grow
-Compete in both 9-hole and 18-hole Tournaments in every exciting season
-Multiplayer mode and other challenges await for you to play every day
-Beautiful 3D golf courses of different themes and difficulties will always present an ultimate golf challenge

GROW YOUR GOLF SKILLS
-Playing a golfing simulator like Golf Rival is unlike any free golf games you’ve tried before thanks to creative and fantastical clubs and balls
-Win to unlock amazing rewards to take onto the course for your next round and enhance your golf bag
-With every exciting real-time golf clash, you’ll gain important skills and tricks to hit extreme golf shots!

INFINITE GOLF FUN
-Every Golf Rival season is fun and fresh, with new courses, balls and rewards appearing all the time!

-Connect with other members of the exciting Golf Rival community on Facebook and join the conversation

Join golf fans around the world and download Golf Rival to get started on your way to becoming an ultimate golf game champion!  

Golf Rival is available in 13 languages. Join the Golf Rival community on Facebook!

howToPlay:

When you first launch the app, you'll be guided through an introductory sequence that teaches you the fundamentals. Pay close attention to these early instructions, as they lay the foundation for more advanced strategies you'll use later in the game.

Master the controls in Golf Battle by starting with the practice mode. Learn the basic moves first — passing, shooting, and defending — before trying more advanced techniques. description:
Kingshot is an innovative idle medieval survival game that combines strategic gameplay with rich details waiting to be explored.

When a sudden rebellion overturns the fate of an entire dynasty and ignites a devastating war, countless people lose their homes. In a world riddled with societal collapse, rebel invasions, rampant disease, and mobs desperate for resources, survival is the ultimate challenge. As a governor in these turbulent times, it's up to you to lead your people through these adversities, devising internal and diplomatic strategies to rekindle the spark of civilization.

[Core Features]

Defend Against Invasions
Stay vigilant and ready to repel invasions at any moment. Your town, the last bastion of hope, depends on it. Gather resources, upgrade your defenses, and prepare for battle to ensure survival in these tough times.

Manage Human Resources
Enjoy a unique gameplay mechanic involving the allocation of survivor roles such as workers, hunters, and chefs. Monitor their health and happiness to ensure they remain productive. Respond quickly to illness to make sure everyone receives timely treatment.

Establish Laws
Codes of law are vital for sustaining civilization and are crucial for the growth and strength of your town.

[Strategic Gameplay]

Resource Struggle
Amidst the sudden state collapse, the continent is flooded with untapped resources. Refugees, rebels, and power-hungry governors are all eyeing these precious materials. Ready yourself for battle and use every strategy at your disposal to secure these resources!

Battle for Power
Compete against other players for the ultimate honor of becoming the strongest governor in this grand strategy game. Claim the throne and reign supreme!

Forge Alliances
Ease the burden of survival in this chaotic world by forming or joining alliances. Collaborate with allies to rebuild civilization!

Recruit Heroes
The game features a roster of unique heroes, each waiting to be recruited. Bringing together heroes with various talents and skills is essential for taking the initiative and ensuring safety in these desperate times.

Compete with Other Governors
Hone your heroes' skills, assemble your squads, and challenge other governors. Victory not only earns you valuable points, but also grants access to rare items. Lead your town to the top of the rankings and showcase the rise of a great civilization.

Advance Technology
With the rebellion obliterating almost all technological advancements, it's crucial to start rebuilding and reclaiming the fragments of lost tech. The race to master cutting-edge technology could determine the dominator of this new world order!

[Stay Connected]

description:
Get ready to soil your plants as a mob of fun-loving zombies is about to invade your home. Use your arsenal of 49 zombie-zapping plants — peashooters, wall-nuts, cherry bombs and more — to mulchify 26 types of zombies before they break down your door. 

This app offers in-app purchases. You may disable in-app purchasing using your device settings

WINNER OF OVER 30 GAME OF THE YEAR AWARDS*

50 FUN-DEAD LEVELS
Conquer all 50 levels of Adventure mode — through day, night, fog, in a swimming pool, on the rooftop and more. Plus fend off a continual wave of zombies as long as you can with Survival mode!

NOT GARDEN-VARIETY GHOULS
Battle zombie pole-vaulters, snorkelers, bucketheads and 26 more fun-dead zombies. Each has its own special skills, so you'll need to think fast and plant faster to combat them all.
Requires acceptance of EA’s Privacy & Cookie Policy and User Agreement.

SMARTER THAN YOUR AVERAGE ZOMBIE
Be careful how you use your limited supply of greens and seeds. Zombies love brains so much they'll jump, run, dance, swim and even eat plants to get into your house. Open the Almanac to learn more about all the zombies and plants to help plan your strategy. 

FIGHT LONGER, GET STRONGER
Earn 49 powerful perennials as you progress and collect coins to buy a pet snail, power-ups and more.

GROW WITH YOUR GAME
Show off your zombie-zapping prowess by earning 46 awesome achievements and show off your zombie-zapping prowess.

COIN PACKS
Need coins for great new stuff? Buy up to 600,000 coins right from the Main Menu.

*Original Mac/PC downloadable game.

description:
A global zombie infestation has converted many into zombies. As a survivor, your primary goal is to retain your humanity and survive.

- Think Fast, Move Faster!
Begin your journey with an intense survival challenge. Dodge and combat waves of zombies. It's not just about survival; it's about quick reflexes and strategic thinking, as each lane presents unique obstacles and zombies!

- Create Your Zombie-Free Shelter
Customize your base and expand your army - you are the light in this shelter, leading people towards a glimmer of hope. In this strategic game, your choices in building and developing your base will shape the future of your survivors in a world overrun by zombies.

- Assemble Your Dream Team
Assemble your ultimate team by recruiting heroes. With a choice of three military branches, each hero comes with their own unique skills. Combine different heroes to easily achieve victory against the zombies.

- Unite for the Greater Good
In the challenging world of zombies, survival is a team effort. Partner with players from all over the globe to battle the zombies. Stay alert – alliances are complex, and not every survivor you encounter is friendly.

How long can you last in this apocalypse? Join Last War: Survival Game and embark on a thrilling journey of survival and strategy!

description:
Prosperous Spring! The surprises never end! The Fortune Dragon is appearing in the Labyrinth. Attack it to earn amazing rewards!

Are you ready for a REAL fight?

The true Emperor has fallen. We need a real hero, a true Lord who can unite the Kingdoms. Recruit heroes from various backgrounds, from dwarves and mermaids to dark elves and steampunk robots, and assemble your army in this magical world! Fight and conquer to establish your empire in the strategy games!

[Game Features]:

▶▶ Embark on the Guild Expedition ◀◀
Experience a grand Guild vs Guild battle, where multiple guilds compete against each other to expand their territory. Troops will not perish in this special battleground, allowing you to unleash your full potential without any worries! Unite your guild and strategize to conquer the battlefield!

▶ ▶  Collect Artifacts! ◀◀
Discover ancient Artifacts in the Artifact Hall. Upgrade and enhance them to unlock their true power! 

▶ ▶ Build Your Own Kingdom ◀◀
Upgrade buildings, conduct research, train your troops, level your Heroes and lead your Kingdom well to prosper in this strategy game!

▶ ▶ Utilize Troop Formations ◀◀
4 different troop types, and 6 different troop formations for you to choose from! Plan your lineups, take advantage of the counter system, and pair your troops with the right Heroes! Perfect your strategy to defeat your enemies!

▶ ▶ Powerful Heroes Await ◀◀
Create a strong team of 5 Heroes to fight through an RPG-style campaign! Let them lead your kingdom to glory as war generals!

▶ ▶ Forge Alliances ◀◀
Join a guild to fight alongside your allies! Ride into war together to conquer various exhilarating events: Guild Wars, Kingdom Versus Kingdom battles, Battle Royals, Wonder Wars, Darknest Invasions, and much more!

▶ ▶ Clash Online with Global Players ◀◀
Brawl with millions of players from all over the world, and defeat those who stand in your way! Seize the throne and rule over all in this amazing strategy game!

▶ ▶ Animated Battles ◀◀
Experience the thrill of war as your armies clash in beautiful 3D graphics! Watch as your Heroes unleash their skills and harness their mystical power!

description:
ALL FOR THE CROWN!
Build a formidable team, attack enemy towers, and use strategy skills to defend your own in multiplayer PvP card battles. Unlock 100+ unique cards, build an unrivalled battle deck, and defend your King’s Tower using strategy, wit, and Skeletons.

Battle in multiplayer PvP card strategy matches with players all over the world. Unlock new characters and use Evo Shards to make your card deck more powerful. Take down enemy towers…but don’t forget to defend your own!

BUILD DECKS, BATTLE, WIN!
Enter the Arena! Build your Battle Deck and outsmart the enemy in fast-paced multiplayer PvP tower defense card battles. From the creators of CLASH OF CLANS, starring your favorite Clash® characters and more. 

BECOME A MASTER OF STRATEGY & DEFEND YOUR TOWERS
Choose unique cards for your Battle Deck and head to the Arena for multiplayer PvP card games!
Hone your strategy: place your Cards right and knock the enemy King and Princesses from their towers in fast-paced PvP battles—just make sure you remember to defend your own Tower.

COLLECT CARDS, BUILD YOUR STRATEGY
Hog Rider! Collect and upgrade 100+ cards featuring the Clash of Clans troops, spells and defences you know and love. Use strategy to defend your towers, win multiplayer PvP card battle games and progress to new Arenas to unlock powerful new cards for your collection!

BATTLE YOUR WAY TO THE TOP
Defend your Towers, hone your strategy, and upgrade your cards to battle your way to the multiplayer PvP League games and Global Tournaments! Match against the best players in the world and compete in multiplayer PvP card battles for glory and rewards!

SEASONAL EVENTS
Unlock new items like Tower Skins, Emotes, and powerful Magic Items to use in multiplayer PvP battles with the season pass – and participate in fun challenges that put your card battle skills to the test!

JOIN A CLAN AND GO TO WAR
Join or form a Clan with other players to share cards, and battle in multiplayer PvP Clan Wars and card games for BIG rewards!

Build your card battle deck, hone your strategy, defend your towers, and get ready to clash! See you in the battle Arena!

PLEASE NOTE! Clash Royale is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you do not want to use this feature, please set up password protection for purchases in the settings of your Google Play Store app. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash Royale.

A network connection is also required.

Support
Are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clash-royale/ or http://supr.cl/ClashRoyaleForum or contact us in game by going to Settings > Help and Support.

description:
The epic Attack on Titan collaboration has arrived! Team up with Eren and step through the rift in time to face a new set of trials in a post-apocalyptic world. Confront the threat of massive mutants head-on! Overcome ultimate challenges to unlock exclusive new Heroes and Shelter Skins, plus claim a ton of collaboration rewards. Commander, the truth about this world awaits you. Join the fight now and make this battlefield your own!

Doomsday: Last Survivors is a zombie survival game with multiplayer online competition and real-time strategy elements. Set in a near future where zombies have taken over the world, survivors must fight for their lives and humanity's future. As the Commander, you must lead fellow survivors to build their Shelter, explore fog-filled areas, and fight the zombies and rival factions! Are you tired of the usual strategy games and love zombie games? Check out Doomsday: Last Survivors to experience the exciting survival game!

[Game Highlights]

New Tower Defense Gameplay
Find new ways to beat your enemies in one of the coolest strategy games! Skilled survivors will join you to explore this fallen world oozing with the infected. Stay sharp, set up ideal Hero formations, and construct fortifications to survive the zombie invasion!

Survival of the Fittest
Lead troops and civilians in your Shelter! Exterminate zombies to survive the apocalypse, or raid other Shelters to sustain your own. You can also form an alliance and fight enemies with your allies in one of the best survival games!

A Realistic Doomsday Experience
The crisis continues to loom over us in a cruel world where it's kill or be killed. Want to experience one of the best immersive survival experiences in zombie games? Look no further! Check out the realistic spherical terrain system with convenient zoom controls that enable close-up Shelter views to satellite views. Download Doomsday: Last Survivors today!

Strategic Battles
Become the best at survival games by utilizing everything you can find. Train multiple troop types and execute diverse battle strategies with Hero skills and attacks to outlast the zombie hordes.

Unique Heroes
Realistic and exciting Hero designs portray survivors from different walks of life. Recruit talented Heroes to help lead your troops, defend your Shelter, and beat one of the best strategy games!

Commander, are you ready to survive the apocalypse?
Become the best at zombie games with your strength and wits!

description:
Gear up and brace yourself for the ultimate test of zombie apocalypse survival! Dive into thrilling gameplay and uncover captivating events that await your exploration!

As a sudden and catastrophic zombie virus ravages human society, your once cozy life is shattered. Family and friends turn into the walking dead before your very eyes. Escaping the chaos of your crumbling home, you now face the ultimate challenge: setting up a shelter to survive the zombie apocalyptic world, and reigniting the flames of human civilization. 

Can you successfully adapt to the hostile environment teeming with dangers, and lead your fellow survivors in rebuilding civilization? It's time for you to step up!

UNIQUE FEATURES

Assign Jobs
Assign your survivors to specialized work to maximize your shelter's growth. Don't forget to keep an eye on their health and happiness to ensure their productivity!

STRATEGIC MECHANICS

Gather & Explore
Venture into the desolate wastelands in search of valuable resources and rare items. Uncover hidden treasures and unlock new territories where dangers also lurk around every corner. 

Build & Expand 
Construct a sturdy shelter and fortify it against the ever-evolving zombie threats. Upgrade your defenses, unlock powerful weapons, and establish a safe haven for fellow survivors.

Recruit & Research
As the leader, you must assemble a diverse team of survivors with unique skills and abilities. Train them and equip them with powerful weapons and technologies to maximize their potential in battles against the undead.

Ally & Conquer
Join forces with other survivors to create a legendary alliance. Work together to conquer difficult challenges, win epic battles, and strategize to reclaim the world from the clutches of the undead.

Do you have what it takes to survive and thrive in the zombie apocalypse? Download the game and dive in now!
